1471:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    customers;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    customers;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    customers;

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio
FROM customers;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    customers;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    transactions_1k;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN CustomerID ELSE NULL END) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN CustomerID ELSE NULL END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    customers;
1472: SELECT CustomerID FROM yearmonth WHERE Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'LAM') ORDER BY Consumption ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.CustomerID, T1.Segment FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T2.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND T1.Segment = 'LAM' ORDER BY T2.Consumption ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.CustomerID, SUM(T2.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers AS T1
JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Date LIKE '2012%'
GROUP BY T1.CustomerID
ORDER BY TotalConsumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment
FROM customers AS c
JOIN yearmonth AS y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE y.Date LIKE '2012%'
AND c.Segment = 'LAM'
ORDER BY y.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.CustomerID, SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T1.Date LIKE '2012%'
AND T2.Country = 'LAM'
GROUP BY T1.CustomerID
ORDER BY TotalConsumption ASC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT T1.CustomerID, T1.Consumption FROM yearmonth AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date LIKE '2012%' AND T2.Segment = 'LAM' ORDER BY T1.Consumption ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT T2.CustomerID, T2.Segment
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
AND T2.Segment = 'LAM'
ORDER BY T1.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE y.Date LIKE '2012%' AND c.Segment = 'LAM'
GROUP BY c.CustomerID

LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.CustomerID, SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1

WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'

SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, c.Currency
FROM yearmonth AS ym
JOIN customers AS c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID

AND c.Segment = 'LAM'

SELECT t1.CustomerID, t1.Consumption FROM yearmonth AS t1 JOIN customers AS t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID WHERE t1.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND t2.Segment = 'LAM' ORDER BY t1.Consumption ASC LIMIT 1
1473:
SELECT AVG(T1.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Segment = 'SME'
AND T1.Date LIKE '2013%'

SELECT AVG(Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME'
AND LEFT(yearmonth.Date, 4) = '2013';

SELECT AVG(yearmonth.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM customers
JOIN yearmonth ON customers.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME'
AND SUBSTR(yearmonth.Date, 1, 4) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2013';

SELECT AVG(T1.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Segment = 'SME' AND LEFT(T1.Date, 4) = '2013';

SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.Consumption) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.Date) AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Segment = 'SME' AND T1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312';

FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND T2.Segment = 'SME'

WHERE T2.Segment = 'SME'
AND T1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312';

SELECT AVG(T2.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption

AND T2.Date LIKE '2013%'
SELECT AVG(T2.Consumption) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Segment = 'SME' AND T2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'

SELECT AVG(Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption

1479:
SELECT strftime('%Y', T2.Date) AS Year, SUM(T2.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM transactions_1k AS T1
JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID AND T1.Date = T2.Date
WHERE T1.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY Year
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN 
    customers AS T3 ON T2.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T3.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    Year
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth
JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE 
    customers.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    Year
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT ym.Date AS Year, SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth ym ON t.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE t.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY ym.Date
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(y.year, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth y
JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON y.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE 
    t.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    Year
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) AS Year, SUM(T2.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM transactions_1k AS T1
JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T1.Amount > 0 AND T1.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date)
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DATE_PART('year', ym.Date) AS Year, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN transactions_1k t ON ym.CustomerID = t.CustomerID AND ym.Date::text LIKE t.Date::text || '%'
WHERE t.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY Year
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN 
    customers AS T3 ON T2.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T3.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    Year
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4)
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) AS Year, SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY Year
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) AS Year, SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date)
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;
1480:
SELECT ym.Date, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID AND t.TransactionID = ym.TransactionID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY ym.Date
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) AS Month,
    SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth
JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE 
    SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
    AND customers.Segment = 'SME'
GROUP BY 
    Year, Month
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(Date, 1, 7) AS YearMonth,
    SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    customers
JOIN 
    yearmonth ON customers.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
WHERE 
    customers.Segment = 'SME'
    AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    YearMonth
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS Year, SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) AS Month, SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND Year = '2013'
GROUP BY Year, Month
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT ym.Date AS Month, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY ym.Date
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(T3.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUBSTR(T3.Date, 5, 2) AS Month,
    SUM(T3.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID AND SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = SUBSTR(T3.Date, 1, 4)
WHERE 
    T1.Segment = 'SME' AND SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
GROUP BY 
    Year, Month
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(T2.Date, 5, 2) AS Month,
    SUM(T2.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Segment = 'SME' AND
    T2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    SUBSTR(T2.Date, 5, 2)
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.Date, SUM(T2.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers AS T1
JOIN transactions_1k AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T3.Date = T2.Date
WHERE T1.Segment = 'SME' AND SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
GROUP BY T2.Date
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) AS YearMonth, T1.Consumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Segment = 'SME' AND SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2013'
GROUP BY SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4)
ORDER BY SUM(T1.Consumption) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4), SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Segment = 'SME' AND SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
GROUP BY SUBSTR(T1.Date, 5, 2)
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUBSTR(T1.Date, 5, 2) AS Month,
    SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND T2.Segment = 'SME'
GROUP BY 
    Month
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;
1476:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM customers AS T1
JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE strftime('%Y', T2.Date) = '2012'

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE 
    y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212';

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN T3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM customers AS T1
JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID AND LEFT(T3.Date, 6) BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Date LIKE '2012%'

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN T3.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) - 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T3.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID AND strftime('%Y', T3.Date) = '2012';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID AND t.Date = y.Date
WHERE 
    y.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-12-31';

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
       SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID AND t.Date LIKE '2012%'

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN T3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -

SELECT

    customers AS T1

    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID

    yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Segment = 'CZK' THEN T3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -

1483: SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311'

SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311'
SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311';

SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID = 6
  AND LEFT(Date, 4) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2013'
  AND SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) BETWEEN '08' AND '11';

SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311'
AND CustomerID = 6;

SELECT SUM(t2.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers t1
JOIN yearmonth t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID
WHERE t1.CustomerID = 6 AND t2.Date LIKE '201308%' OR t2.Date LIKE '201309%' OR t2.Date LIKE '201310%' OR t2.Date LIKE '201311%'

SELECT SUM(T1.Consumption)
FROM yearmonth AS T1
INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T1.CustomerID = 6 AND T1.Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311'
SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311'

SELECT SUM(Consumption) 
FROM yearmonth 
WHERE CustomerID = 6 
AND SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013' 
AND SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) BETWEEN '08' AND '11';

1484:
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'CZE' AND Segment LIKE '%discount%') -
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'SVK' AND Segment LIKE '%discount%') AS difference;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStationsInCzechRepublic,
       COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStationsInSlovakia
FROM gasstations
WHERE Country = 'CZE' AND Segment LIKE '%discount%'
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStationsInCzechRepublic,
       COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStationsInSlovakia
FROM gasstations
WHERE Country = 'SVK' AND Segment LIKE '%discount%';

1482:
SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageChange
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    PercentageChange ASC, PercentageChange DESC;

SELECT 
    T1.Segment,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY 
    T1.Segment
ORDER BY 
    ABS(PercentageIncrease) DESC;

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
JOIN 
    customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    PercentageIncrease DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    AVG(((y2.Consumption - y1.Consumption) / y2.Consumption) * 100) AS AvgPercentageIncrease
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth y1 ON c.CustomerID = y1.CustomerID AND y1.Date LIKE '2012%'
JOIN 
    yearmonth y2 ON c.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID AND y2.Date LIKE '2013%'
WHERE 
    y1.Consumption IS NOT NULL 
    AND y2.Consumption IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    AvgPercentageIncrease DESC;

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageChange
FROM 
    yearmonth y
JOIN 
    customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Currency = 'EUR' AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    PercentageChange DESC;

SELECT 
    Segment, 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN LEFT(Date, 4) = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN LEFT(Date, 4) = '2012' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN LEFT(Date, 4) = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageChange
FROM 
    customers
JOIN 
    yearmonth ON customers.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
WHERE 
    LEFT(Date, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
GROUP BY 
    Segment
ORDER BY 
    ABS(PercentageChange) DESC;

WITH yearly_consumption AS (
    SELECT
        SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
        T1.CustomerID,
        T1.Segment,
        SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM
        yearmonth AS T1
    JOIN
        customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
    WHERE
        Year IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY
        Year, T1.CustomerID, T1.Segment
),
percentage_increase AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        ((SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN TotalConsumption ELSE 0 END) -
         SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN TotalConsumption ELSE 0 END)) /
         SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN TotalConsumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS IncreasePercentage
    FROM
        yearly_consumption
    GROUP BY
        Segment
)
SELECT
    Segment,
    IncreasePercentage,
    CASE
        WHEN IncreasePercentage >= MAX(IncreasePercentage) OVER () THEN 'Biggest'
        WHEN IncreasePercentage <= MIN(IncreasePercentage) OVER () THEN 'Lowest'
        ELSE ''
    END AS Trend
FROM
    percentage_increase;

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    AVG(((t2.Consumption - t1.Consumption) / t2.Consumption) * 100) AS AvgPercentageIncrease
FROM 
    yearmonth t1
JOIN 
    yearmonth t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID AND ABS(STRFTIME('%Y', t1.Date) - STRFTIME('%Y', t2.Date)) = 1
JOIN 
    customers c ON t1.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    STRFTIME('%Y', t1.Date) IN ('2012', '2013')
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment;

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN t.Amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN t.Amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN t.Amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageChange
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    yearmonth ym ON t.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID AND t.Date = ym.Date
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    t.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    PercentageChange DESC;

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    MAX(((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100) AS max_percentage_increase,
    MIN(((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100) AS min_percentage_increase
FROM 
    yearmonth y
JOIN 
    customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    y.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment;

WITH filtered_transactions AS (
    SELECT
        T1.CustomerID,
        SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Date) = '2012' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Date) = '2013' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM
        yearmonth AS T1
    JOIN
        customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
    WHERE
        T2.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM') AND T2.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY
        T1.CustomerID
)
SELECT
    T2.Segment,
    ((T1.consumption_2013 - T1.consumption_2012) / T1.consumption_2013) * 100 AS percentage_increase
FROM
    filtered_transactions AS T1
JOIN
    customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
ORDER BY
    percentage_increase DESC
LIMIT 2;

WITH filtered_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25' AND c.Currency = 'EUR'
),
total_customers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS TotalCount
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-25'
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(filtered_transactions.CustomerID) * 100.0 / total_customers.TotalCount) AS Percentage
FROM 
    filtered_transactions, total_customers;

    transactions_1k AS T1

    customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Date = '2012-08-25';

1526: SELECT (t2.consumption_2012 - t2.consumption_2013) / t2.consumption_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate FROM transactions_1k t1 JOIN yearmonth t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID WHERE t1.Date = '2012-08-25' AND t1.Amount = 634.8

SELECT 
    (T2.Consumption_2012 - T2.Consumption_2013) / T2.Consumption_2012 AS Consumption_Decrease_Rate
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID AND T1.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-12-31'
WHERE 
    T1.Amount = 634.8 AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', T1.Date) = '2012-08-25';

SELECT 
    (t1.Consumption_2012 - t1.Consumption_2013) / t1.Consumption_2012 AS Consumption_Decrease_Rate
FROM 
    (SELECT 
        ym1.Consumption AS Consumption_2012,
        ym2.Consumption AS Consumption_2013
     FROM 
        yearmonth ym1
     JOIN 
        yearmonth ym2 ON ym1.CustomerID = ym2.CustomerID AND ym1.Date LIKE '2012%' AND ym2.Date LIKE '2013%'
     WHERE 
        ym1.Date = '2012-08-25'
        AND ym2.Date = '2013-08-25') t1

SELECT 
    (t2.Consumption - t3.Consumption) / t2.Consumption AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS t1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID AND t1.Date = '2012-08-25'
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS t3 ON t1.CustomerID = t3.CustomerID AND t3.Date LIKE '2013%'
WHERE 
    t1.Amount = 634.8;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.Date) = '2012' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.Date) = '2013' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.Date) = '2012' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID AND T1.Date = T2.Date
WHERE 
    T2.Amount = 634.8 AND T1.Date = '2012-08-25';

SELECT 
    (t2.Consumption - t3.Consumption) / t2.Consumption AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS t1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID AND t1.Date = '2012-08-25'
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS t3 ON t1.CustomerID = t3.CustomerID AND t3.Year = 2013
WHERE 
    t1.Amount = 634.8;

SELECT 
    (T1.Consumption - T2.Consumption) / T1.Consumption AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2
ON 
    T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Date BETWEEN '2012-08-01' AND '2012-08-31'
AND 
    T2.Date BETWEEN '2013-08-01' AND '2013-08-31'
AND 
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM transactions_1k 
        WHERE transactions_1k.CustomerID = T1.CustomerID 
        AND transactions_1k.Date = '2012-08-25' 
        AND transactions_1k.Amount = 634.8
    )

-- Step 1: Identify the Customer
WITH CustomerTransaction AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Amount = 634.8
),

-- Step 2: Calculate Consumption for 2012
Consumption2012 AS (
    SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption_2012
    FROM yearmonth
    JOIN CustomerTransaction ON yearmonth.CustomerID = CustomerTransaction.CustomerID
    WHERE Date LIKE '2012-08-%'
),

-- Step 3: Calculate Consumption for 2013
Consumption2013 AS (
    SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption_2013
    FROM yearmonth
    JOIN CustomerTransaction ON yearmonth.CustomerID = CustomerTransaction.CustomerID
    WHERE Date LIKE '2013-08-%'
)

-- Step 4: Compute the Consumption Decrease Rate
SELECT 
    (total_consumption_2012 - total_consumption_2013) / total_consumption_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM Consumption2012, Consumption2013;

SELECT 
    (y2012.Consumption - y2013.Consumption) / y2012.Consumption AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    yearmonth y2012
JOIN 
    yearmonth y2013 ON y2012.CustomerID = y2013.CustomerID
WHERE 
    y2012.Date LIKE '%/%/2012%' AND y2012.Consumption IS NOT NULL
AND 
    y2013.Date LIKE '%/%/2013%' AND y2013.Consumption IS NOT NULL
AND 
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM transactions_1k t 
        WHERE t.CustomerID = y2012.CustomerID 
        AND t.Date = '2012-08-25' 
        AND t.Amount = 634.8
    );

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.Date) = '2012' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.Date) = '2013' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.Date) = '2012' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID AND T1.Date = T2.Date
WHERE 
    T2.Date = '2012-08-25' AND T2.Amount = 634.8;

WITH consumption_2012 AS (
    SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS sum_2012
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Amount = 634.8) AND strftime('%Y', Date) = '2012'
),
consumption_2013 AS (
    SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS sum_2013
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Amount = 634.8) AND strftime('%Y', Date) = '2013'
)
SELECT (sum_2012 - sum_2013) / sum_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM consumption_2012, consumption_2013;

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Description LIKE '%premium%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(t.TransactionID) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
WHERE t.Country = 'SVK';

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Description = 'Premium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(t.TransactionID) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE g.Country = 'SVK';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Description LIKE '%premium%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(t.TransactionID) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
JOIN 
    gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE 
    g.Country = 'SVK';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Description = 'premium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(t.TransactionID) AS PercentagePremium
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Country = 'SVK';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Segment = 'Premium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.TransactionID) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS T1
JOIN 
    gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID
JOIN 
    customers AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Country = 'SVK';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.Description LIKE '%premium%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(p.ProductID) AS premium_percentage
FROM 
    products p
JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON p.ProductID = t.ProductID
JOIN 
    gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE 
    g.Country = 'SVK';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN p.Description = 'premium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(t.TransactionID)) * 100 AS PremiumPercentage
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
JOIN 
    gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE 
    g.Country = 'SVK';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Description LIKE '%premium%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS PremiumPercentage
FROM 
    products AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID
JOIN 
    gasstations AS T3 ON T2.GasStationID = T3.GasStationID
WHERE 
    T3.Country = 'SVK';

SELECT 
    T1.Segment,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Description LIKE '%premium%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS T1
JOIN 
    products AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID
JOIN 
    gasstations AS T3 ON T1.GasStationID = T3.GasStationID
WHERE 
    T3.Country = 'SVK'
GROUP BY 
    T1.Segment;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Description LIKE '%premium%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM 
    gasstations AS T1
JOIN 
    products AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T3 ON T1.GasStationID = T3.GasStationID AND T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Country = 'SVK'

SELECT 
    (COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions_1k WHERE Country = 'SVK')) AS percentage_premium
FROM transactions_1k AS t1
JOIN products AS t2 ON t1.ProductID = t2.ProductID
WHERE t2.Description LIKE '%premium%'

SELECT DISTINCT T1.CustomerID

SELECT 
    t.CustomerID,
    AVG(t.Price / t.Amount) AS AveragePricePerItem,
    c.Currency
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY 
    t.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY 
    SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, AVG(t.Price) AS AveragePricePerItem, c.Currency
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, AVG(t.Price / t.Amount) AS AveragePricePerItem, c.Currency
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.CustomerID,
    AVG(t.Price) AS AveragePricePerItem,
    c.Currency
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY 
    c.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY 
    SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, c.Currency, AVG(t.Price / t.Amount) AS AveragePricePerItem
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY CustomerID
    ORDER BY SUM(Amount) DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment, c.Currency;

SELECT c.CustomerID, AVG(t.Price / t.Amount) AS AveragePricePerItem, c.Currency
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, AVG(t.Price) AS AveragePricePerItem, c.Currency
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.Currency,
    AVG(t.Price / t.Amount) AS AveragePricePerItem
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE 
    t.CustomerID = (
        SELECT 
            CustomerID
        FROM 
            transactions_1k
        GROUP BY 
            CustomerID
        ORDER BY 
            SUM(Amount) DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

WITH TopSpender AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Amount) as TotalSpent
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY CustomerID
    ORDER BY TotalSpent DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT AVG(Price) as AveragePricePerItem, Currency
FROM transactions_1k
JOIN customers ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE transactions_1k.CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM TopSpender);

SELECT c.CustomerID, AVG(t.Price / t.Amount) AS AveragePricePerItem, c.Currency
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE t.CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY CustomerID
    ORDER BY SUM(Amount) DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Currency;

WITH TopSpendingCustomer AS (
  SELECT CustomerID
  FROM transactions_1k
  GROUP BY CustomerID
  ORDER BY SUM(Amount) DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  c.CustomerID,
  c.Segment,
  c.Currency,
  AVG(t.Price) AS AveragePricePerItem
FROM 
  transactions_1k t
JOIN 
  customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
  t.CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM TopSpendingCustomer)
GROUP BY 
  c.CustomerID, c.Segment, c.Currency;

SELECT 
    Segment,
    AVG(Consumption) AS AnnualAverageConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth
JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Date) = 2013
GROUP BY 
    Segment;

WITH filtered_data AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        Segment,
        AVG(Consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth
    WHERE 
        SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
    GROUP BY 
        CustomerID, Segment
),
segment_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        AVG(avg_consumption) AS avg_annual_consumption
    FROM 
        filtered_data
    GROUP BY 
        Segment
)
SELECT 
    s1.Segment,
    s2.Segment,
    ABS(s2.avg_annual_consumption - s1.avg_annual_consumption) AS diff
FROM 
    segment_avg s1
JOIN 
    segment_avg s2
ON 
    s1.Segment < s2.Segment
ORDER BY 
    s1.Segment;

WITH LowestConsumption AS (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        y.CustomerID,
        y.Consumption,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY c.Segment ORDER BY y.Consumption ASC) AS rank
    FROM
        customers c
    JOIN
        yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE
        y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
        AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
),
FilteredCustomers AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        CustomerID,
        Consumption
    FROM
        LowestConsumption
    WHERE
        rank = 1
)
SELECT
    Segment,
    AVG(Consumption) AS AnnualAverageConsumption
FROM
    FilteredCustomers
GROUP BY
    Segment;

WITH filtered_data AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption,
        COUNT(*) AS NumberOfCustomers
    FROM 
        yearmonth
    WHERE 
        Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
        AND CustomerID IN (
            SELECT CustomerID
            FROM yearmonth
            GROUP BY CustomerID, Segment
            HAVING MIN(Consumption)
        )
    GROUP BY 
        CustomerID, Segment
),
segment_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        AVG(TotalConsumption) AS AnnualAverageConsumption
    FROM 
        filtered_data
    GROUP BY 
        Segment
)
SELECT 
    LAG(Segment) OVER (ORDER BY AnnualAverageConsumption) AS PreviousSegment,
    Segment,
    AnnualAverageConsumption,
    LEAD(Segment) OVER (ORDER BY AnnualAverageConsumation) AS NextSegment,
    AnnualAverageConsumption - LAG(AverageAnnualConsumption) OVER (ORDER BY AnnualAverageConsumation) AS DifferenceWithPrevious,
    AnnualAverageConsumption - LEAD(AverageAnnualConsumption) OVER (ORDER BY AnnualAverageConsumation) AS DifferenceWithNext
FROM 
    segment_consumption;

WITH filtered_data AS (
    SELECT 
        y.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        y.Consumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth y
    JOIN 
        customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
),
grouped_data AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        Segment,
        AVG(Consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM 
        filtered_data
    GROUP BY 
        CustomerID, Segment
),
min_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(avg_consumption) AS min_avg_consumption
    FROM 
        grouped_data
    GROUP BY 
        Segment
)
SELECT 
    s1.Segment,
    s2.Segment,
    ABS(s1.avg_consumption - s2.avg_consumption) AS diff
FROM 
    grouped_data g1
JOIN 
    min_consumption m1 ON g1.Segment = m1.Segment
JOIN 
    grouped_data g2 ON g2.Segment = m1.Segment AND g2.CustomerID = m1.CustomerID
JOIN 
    min_consumption m2 ON g2.Segment = m2.Segment
WHERE 
    g1.Segment < g2.Segment;

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    AVG(y.Consumption) AS AnnualAverageConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth y
JOIN 
    customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    AnnualAverageConsumption ASC;

-- Calculate differences
WITH AvgConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        AVG(y.Consumption) AS AnnualAverageConsumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth y
    JOIN 
        customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY 
        c.Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT AnnualAverageConsumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT AnnualAverageConsumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS Diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT AnnualAverageConsumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT AnnualAverageConsumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS Diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT AnnualAverageConsumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT AnnualAverageConsumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS Diff_KAM_SME;

SELECT 
    'SME to LAM' AS Comparison,
    AVG(TotalConsumption_SME / NumCustomers_SME) - AVG(TotalConsumption_LAM / NumCustomers_LAM) AS Difference
FROM (
    SELECT 
        SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption_SME,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS NumCustomers_SME
    FROM 
        yearmonth
    JOIN 
        customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
        AND Segment = 'SME'
) AS Subquery1
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT 
        SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption_LAM,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS NumCustomers_LAM
    FROM 
        yearmonth
    JOIN 
        customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
        AND Segment = 'LAM'
) AS Subquery2;

WITH filtered_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM 
        customers c
    JOIN 
        yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY 
        c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
least_consumption_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(TotalConsumption) AS MinConsumption
    FROM 
        filtered_customers
    GROUP BY 
        Segment
),
average_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        f.Segment,
        AVG(f.TotalConsumption) AS AvgConsumption
    FROM 
        filtered_customers f
    JOIN 
        least_consumption_customers l ON f.Segment = l.Segment AND f.TotalConsumption = l.MinConsumption
    GROUP BY 
        f.Segment
)
SELECT 
    'SME to LAM' AS Comparison,
    a.AvgConsumption - b.AvgConsumption AS Difference
FROM 
    average_consumption a
JOIN 
    average_consumption b ON a.Segment = 'SME' AND b.Segment = 'LAM'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'LAM to KAM',
    b.AvgConsumption - c.AvgConsumption
FROM 
    average_consumption b
JOIN 
    average_consumption c ON b.Segment = 'LAM' AND c.Segment = 'KAM'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'KAM to SME',
    c.AvgConsumption - a.AvgConsumption
FROM 
    average_consumption c
JOIN 
    average_consumption a ON c.Segment = 'KAM' AND a.Segment = 'SME';

SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth AS T1 
     JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID 
     WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' 
       AND T2.Segment = 'SME' 
       AND T2.Currency = 'CZK') - 
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth AS T1 
     JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID 
     WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' 
       AND T2.Segment = 'LAM' 
       AND T2.Currency = 'CZK') AS diff_sme_lam,

    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth AS T1 
     JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID 
     WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' 
       AND T2.Segment = 'LAM'

    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth AS T1 
     JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID 
     WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' 
       AND T2.Segment = 'KAM' 
       AND T2.Currency = 'CZK') AS diff_lam_kam,

     JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID 
     WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' 
       AND T2.Segment = 'KAM'

     WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' 
       AND T2.Segment = 'SME'

WITH MinConsumption AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(Consumption) AS MinConsumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth 
     JOIN MinConsumption ON yearmonth.CustomerID = MinConsumption.CustomerID 
     WHERE yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' 
       AND yearmonth.Consumption = MinConsumption.MinConsumption 
       AND yearmonth.Segment = 'SME') - 
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth 
     JOIN MinConsumption ON yearmonth.CustomerID = MinConsumption.CustomerID 
     WHERE yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' 
       AND yearmonth.Consumption = MinConsumption.MinConsumption 
       AND yearmonth.Segment = 'LAM') AS Diff_SME_LAM,
    
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth 
     JOIN MinConsumption ON yearmonth.CustomerID = MinConsumption.CustomerID 
     WHERE yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' 
       AND yearmonth.Consumption = MinConsumption.MinConsumption 
       AND yearmonth.Segment = 'LAM') - 
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth 
     JOIN MinConsumption ON yearmonth.CustomerID = MinConsumption.CustomerID 
     WHERE yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' 
       AND yearmonth.Consumption = MinConsumption.MinConsumption 
       AND yearmonth.Segment = 'KAM') AS Diff_LAM_KAM,
    
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth 
     JOIN MinConsumption ON yearmonth.CustomerID = MinConsumption.CustomerID 
     WHERE yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' 
       AND yearmonth.Consumption = MinConsumption.MinConsumption 
       AND yearmonth.Segment = 'KAM') - 
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth 
     JOIN MinConsumption ON yearmonth.CustomerID = MinConsumption.CustomerID 
     WHERE yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' 
       AND yearmonth.Consumption = MinConsumption.MinConsumption 
       AND yearmonth.Segment = 'SME') AS Diff_KAM_SME;

JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event

JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
WHERE T1.notes LIKE '%Student_Club%'

SELECT 
    (SELECT SUM(b.spent) 
     FROM budget b 
     JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id 
     WHERE e.link_to_member IN (
         SELECT m.member_id 
         FROM member m 
         WHERE m.position = 'Student_Club'
     ) 
     AND SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019') -
    (SELECT SUM(b.spent) 
     FROM budget b 
     JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id 
     WHERE e.link_to_member IN (
         SELECT m.member_id 
         FROM member m 
         WHERE m.position = 'Student_Club'
     ) 
     AND SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020') AS difference;

    SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM 
    event e
JOIN 
    budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE 
    b.category = 'Advertisement';

    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) /

    event AS T1

    budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event;

    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) AS ratio

SELECT e.type, SUM(e.cost) AS total_value
FROM event AS e
JOIN attendance AS a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN expense AS exp ON a.link_to_member = exp.link_to_member AND e.event_id = exp.link_to_budget
WHERE e.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND exp.approved = 'approved'
GROUP BY e.type;

SELECT e.expense_type, SUM(e.cost) AS total_value
FROM expense e
JOIN event ev ON e.link_to_event = ev.event_id
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND e.approved = 'approved'
GROUP BY e.expense_type;

SELECT DISTINCT e.expense_description, SUM(e.cost) AS total_value
FROM expense e
JOIN member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event ev ON a.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND e.approved = 'Yes'
GROUP BY e.expense_description;

SELECT T2.expense_type, SUM(T2.cost) AS total_value
FROM event AS T1
JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.link_to_event = T3.link_to_budget
WHERE T1.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND T3.approved = 'approved'
GROUP BY T2.expense_type;

SELECT e.category, SUM(e.cost) AS total_value
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN expense ex ON a.link_to_member = ex.link_to_member AND e.event_id = ex.link_to_event
WHERE e.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND ex.approved = 'Approved'
GROUP BY e.category;

SELECT expense.expense_description AS expense_type, SUM(expense.cost) AS total_value
FROM event
JOIN expense ON event.event_id = expense.link_to_event
WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND expense.approved = 'yes'
GROUP BY expense.expense_description;

SELECT T2.expense_description, SUM(T2.cost) AS total_value FROM event AS T1 JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event JOIN budget AS T3 ON T2.link_to_budget = T3.budget_id WHERE T1.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND T3.status = 'approved' GROUP BY T2.expense_description;

SELECT expense.expense_description, SUM(expense.cost) AS total_cost
FROM expense
JOIN event ON expense.link_to_event = event.event_id
WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND expense.approved = 'Yes'
GROUP BY expense.expense_description;

SELECT e.expense_type, SUM(e.cost) AS total_value
FROM expense e
JOIN event ev ON e.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'October Meeting'
AND e.approved = 'approved'
GROUP BY e.expense_type;

SELECT e.event_name, b.spent, b.amount, (b.spent - b.amount) AS excess_spent
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY excess_spent DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.amount = 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM 
    member AS T1
JOIN 
    income AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member
WHERE 
    T1.t_shirt_size = 'Medium'

    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.amount = 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.member_id) AS percentage
FROM

JOIN

WHERE

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense)

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone
FROM member AS m
JOIN expense AS e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense)

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN expense e ON a.link_to_event = e.link_to_budget
WHERE e.cost > (SELECT AVG(e2.cost) FROM expense e2)

FROM member AS m
JOIN income AS i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
JOIN expense AS e ON i.income_id = e.link_to_income

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > (SELECT AVG(expense.cost) FROM expense)

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN expense e ON a.link_to_event = e.link_to_member AND a.link_to_event = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense);

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
GROUP BY m.member_id
HAVING SUM(e.cost) > (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense);

SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, T1.phone 
FROM member AS T1 
JOIN expense AS T2 ON T2.link_to_member = T1.member_id 
WHERE T2.cost > (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense)

SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, T1.phone
FROM member AS T1
JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member
JOIN budget AS T3 ON T2.link_to_budget = T3.budget_id
WHERE T2.cost > (
    SELECT AVG(T2.cost)
    FROM member AS T1
    JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member
    GROUP BY T1.member_id
);

WITH AvgExpense AS (
    SELECT AVG(cost) AS avg_cost FROM expense
)
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone, SUM(e.cost) AS total_spent
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone
HAVING SUM(e.cost) > (SELECT avg_cost FROM AvgExpense)
ORDER BY total_spent DESC;

FROM 
    Patient

1149:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient
WHERE 
    SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((COUNT(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0) / 
     COUNT(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END)) AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient AS P
JOIN 
    Examination AS E ON P.ID = E.ID
WHERE 
    P.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS InpatientCount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OutpatientCount,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN e.Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN e.Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100) AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Percentage Deviation"
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Percentage Difference"
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MaleInPatients,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MaleOutPatients,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100) AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient AS P
JOIN 
    Examination AS E ON P.ID = E.ID
WHERE 
    P.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS InPatientMaleCount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OutPatientMaleCount,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient
WHERE 
    SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS InpatientCount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OutpatientCount,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100) AS PercentageDifference
FROM 
    Examination AS T2
INNER JOIN 
    Patient AS T1 ON T2.ID = T1.ID
WHERE 
    T1.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS InpatientPercentage,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS OutpatientPercentage,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    T1.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS InpatientCount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OutpatientCount,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageDeviation
FROM 
    Patient
INNER JOIN 
    Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE 
    Sex = 'M';

INNER JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE e.Symptoms IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT E.Symptoms, P.Diagnosis
FROM Examination AS E
JOIN Patient AS P ON E.ID = P.ID
WHERE P.Birthday IS NOT NULL AND E.Symptoms IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY P.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.Symptoms, e.Diagnosis
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.PatientID = p.ID
WHERE e.Symptoms IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.Symptoms, p.Diagnosis
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.Patient_ID = p.ID
WHERE e.Symptoms IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.Symptoms, e.Diagnosis
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.Patient_ID = p.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = (SELECT MIN(Birthday) FROM Patient)
AND e.Symptoms IS NOT NULL;
1168:
SELECT 
    MAX(e.Examination_Date) AS Latest_Examination_Date,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, p.First_Date) AS Age_At_First_Admission
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON e.ID = l.ID
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS';

SELECT 
    e.Date AS LabCompletionDate,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, p.First_Date) AS AgeAtAdmission
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.Patient_ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    e.Examination_Date, 
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, p.First_Date) AS Age_At_Admission
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DATE, YEAR(First Date) - YEAR(Birthday)
FROM Patient AS P
JOIN Laboratory AS L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY YEAR(First Date) - YEAR(Birthday) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    l.Date AS Lab_Completion_Date,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, p.First_Date) AS Age_At_Admission
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, p.First_Date) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    l.Date AS Lab_Completion_Date,
    YEAR(p.`First Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS Age_At_Arrival
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON e.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis LIKE '%SJS%'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    p.Birthday AS birth_date,
    YEAR(p.`First Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS age_at_arrival,
    l.Date AS lab_completion_date
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.Patient_ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.Patient_ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    age_at_arrival DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    l.Date AS Laboratory_Completion_Date,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, p.First_Date) AS Age_At_Admission
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    e.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT L.Date, YEAR(P.`First Date`) - YEAR(P.Birthday) AS Age
FROM Laboratory L
JOIN Examination E ON L.ID = E.ID
JOIN Patient P ON E.ID = P.ID
WHERE P.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY P.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    l.Date AS Laboratory_Completion_Date,
    (strftime('%Y', p.`First Date`) - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) AS Age_At_Initial_Arrival
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    l.Date AS Laboratory_Completion_Date,

FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

1175:
SELECT 
    YEAR(e.`Examination Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS Age,
    p.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON e.PatientID = l.PatientID
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.PatientID = p.ID
WHERE 
    l.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Laboratory);

SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM E.`Examination Date`) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM P.Birthday) AS Age,
    P.Diagnosis,
    MAX(E.HGB) AS Max_HGB
FROM 
    Examination E
JOIN 
    Patient P ON E.ID = P.ID
WHERE 
    E.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Examination)

SELECT 
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, e.`Examination Date`) AS Age,
    p.Diagnosis,
    l.HGB
FROM 
    Patient p
INNER JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
INNER JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
ORDER BY 
    l.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    YEAR(T1.`Examination Date`) - YEAR(T2.Birthday) AS Age,
    T2.Diagnosis,
    T1.HGB
FROM 
    Laboratory AS T1
JOIN 
    Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    T1.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Laboratory)

SELECT 
    YEAR(T1.`Examination Date`) - YEAR(T2.Birthday) AS Age,
    T2.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Examination AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.Patient_ID = T2.Patient_ID
ORDER BY 
    T2.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    YEAR(T1.`Examination Date`) - YEAR(T2.Birthday) AS Age,
    T2.Diagnosis,
    T1.HGB
FROM 
    Examination AS T1
JOIN 
    Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    T1.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Examination);

SELECT 
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, e.`Examination Date`) AS Age,
    p.Diagnosis,
    l.MAX_HGB
FROM 
    Laboratory l
JOIN 
    Examination e ON l.ID = e.ID
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    l.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Laboratory)

SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T1.`Examination Date`) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T2.Birthday) AS Age,
    T2.SEX,
    T1.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Examination AS T1
JOIN 
    Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
ORDER BY 
    T1.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    YEAR(T2.`Examination Date`) - YEAR(T1.Birthday) AS Age,
    T1.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
ORDER BY 
    T2.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, e.`Examination Date`) AS Age,
    p.Diagnosis AS DoctorDiagnosis,
    l.HGB
FROM 
    Laboratory l
JOIN 
    Examination e ON l.ID = e.ID AND l.Date = e.`Examination Date`
JOIN 
    Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    l.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Laboratory)

SELECT 
    EXAMINATION.`Examination Date` - INTERVAL YEAR(PATIENT.Birthday) YEAR AS Age,
    PATIENT.SEX,
    EXAMINATION.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Examination AS EXAMINATION
JOIN 
    Patient AS PATIENT ON EXAMINATION.Patient_ID = PATIENT.ID
WHERE 
    EXAMINATION.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Examination);

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' AND UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_Male_to_Female
FROM 
    Patient;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' AND L.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' AND L.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MaleToFemaleRatio
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN UA <= 8.0 AND SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN UA <= 6.5 AND SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio

    Laboratory;

    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'F' AND T2.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_Male_to_Female

    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN t1.SEX = 'M' AND t2.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' AND L.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' AND L.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    Patient P

    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio

    Patient AS T1

    (T1.SEX = 'M' AND T2.UA <= 8.0) OR

FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID;

1185:
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' AND Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' AND Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
JOIN 
    Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Date BETWEEN '1981-11-01' AND '1981-11-30' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Date BETWEEN '1981-12-01' AND '1981-12-31' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
JOIN 
    Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) - 1 AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS "Decrease Rate"
FROM 
    Patient
JOIN 
    Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
JOIN 
    Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN T1.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN T1.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
     ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN T1.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END))) * 100 AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory AS T1
JOIN 
    Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    T2.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS decrease,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS december_cholesterol
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN DATE LIKE '1981-11-%' AND P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN L.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN DATE LIKE '1981-12-%' AND P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN L.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN DATE LIKE '1981-12-%' AND P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN L.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(Date) = 11 AND YEAR(Date) = 1981 THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(Date) = 12 AND YEAR(Date) = 1981 THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(Date) = 12 AND YEAR(Date) = 1981 THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
JOIN 
    Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Patient
JOIN 
    Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID

    ((SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) /

SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(P.SEX)) * 100 AS PercentageFemale
FROM Patient P
JOIN Examination E ON P.ID = E.ID
WHERE YEAR(P.Birthday) = 1980 AND E.Diagnosis = 'RA';

SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(P.SEX)) * 100 AS PercentageFemaleWithRA
FROM Patient P
JOIN Examination E ON P.ID = E.ID
WHERE YEAR(P.Birthday) = 1980 AND E.Diagnosis = 'RA';

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Patient.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS FemalePercentage
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE YEAR(Patient.Birthday) = 1980 AND Examination.Diagnosis = 'RA';

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Sex = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(p.ID) AS PercentageOfWomen
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE YEAR(p.Birthday) = 1980 AND e.Diagnosis = 'RA';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Patient.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(Patient.ID) AS PercentageOfWomen
FROM 
    Examination
JOIN 
    Patient ON Examination.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Patient.Birthday) = 1980
    AND Examination.Diagnosis = 'RA';

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN Patient.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PercentageFemaleWithRA
FROM Examination
JOIN Patient ON Examination.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE YEAR(Patient.Birthday) = 1980 AND Examination.Diagnosis = 'RA';

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(p.ID) AS PercentageFemale
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.Birthday) = 1980 AND e.Diagnosis = 'RA';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN Patient.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*)
FROM 
    Patient
JOIN 
    Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Patient.Birthday) = 1980
    AND Examination.Diagnosis = 'RA';

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(E.ID) AS PercentageOfWomenWithRA
FROM Patient P
JOIN Examination E ON P.ID = E.ID
WHERE YEAR(P.Birthday) = '1980' AND E.Diagnosis = 'RA';

SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN Patient.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS PercentageOfWomen FROM Patient INNER JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID WHERE YEAR(Patient.Birthday) = '1980' AND Examination.Diagnosis = 'RA'

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(e.ID) AS FemalePercentage
FROM 
    Patient p
INNER JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE 
    YEAR(p.Birthday) = 1980 AND e.Diagnosis = 'RA';
1205:
SELECT CASE WHEN UA > 8.0 AND SEX = 'M' OR UA > 6.5 AND SEX = 'F' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS NormalRange
FROM Laboratory
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE Patient.ID = 57266;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN l.UA > 8.0 AND p.SEX = 'M' THEN 'Normal'
        WHEN l.UA > 6.5 AND p.SEX = 'F' THEN 'Normal'
        ELSE 'Not Normal'
    END AS UrineAcidStatus
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.ID = 57266;

SELECT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Laboratory AS lab
    JOIN Patient AS pat ON lab.ID = pat.ID
    WHERE pat.ID = 57266
      AND (pat.SEX = 'M' AND lab.UA > 8.0 OR pat.SEX = 'F' AND lab.UA > 6.5)
);

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN P.ID = 57266 AND L.UA > 8.0 THEN 'Normal'
        WHEN P.ID = 57266 AND L.UA > 6.5 THEN 'Normal'
        ELSE 'Not Normal'
    END AS UricAcidStatus
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

SELECT CASE WHEN l.UA > 8.0 AND p.SEX = 'M' OR l.UA > 6.5 AND p.SEX = 'F' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS UA_within_normal_range
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE p.ID = 57266;

SELECT l.*
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE p.ID = 57266 AND (p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA > 8.0 OR p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > 6.5)

SELECT CASE WHEN T1.UA > 8.0 THEN 'Normal' WHEN T1.UA > 6.5 THEN 'Normal' ELSE 'Abnormal' END AS UrineAcidStatus
FROM Laboratory AS T1
JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE T2.ID = 57266;

SELECT CASE WHEN T1.UA > 8.0 AND T2.SEX = 'M' OR T1.UA > 6.5 AND T2.SEX = 'F' THEN 'Normal Range' ELSE 'Outside Normal Range' END AS UracilAcidRange
FROM Laboratory AS T1
JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE T2.ID = 57266;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN T1.UA > 8.0 AND T2.SEX = 'M' OR T1.UA > 6.5 AND T2.SEX = 'F' THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS UrineAcidNormalRange
FROM 
    Laboratory AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    T2.ID = 57266;

SELECT CASE WHEN T1.UA > 8.0 AND T2.SEX = 'M' OR T1.UA > 6.5 AND T2.SEX = 'F' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS UricAcidWithinNormalRange
FROM Laboratory AS T1
JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE T2.ID = 57266;

SELECT 
    T1.ID, 
    T1.Date, 
    T1.UA, 
    CASE 
        WHEN T2.SEX = 'M' AND T1.UA > 8.0 THEN 'Normal'
        WHEN T2.SEX = 'F' AND T1.UA > 6.5 THEN 'Normal'
        ELSE 'Abnormal'
    END AS UA_Range
FROM 
    Laboratory AS T1
JOIN 
    Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    T2.ID = 57266;

HAVING COUNT(l.ID) >= 2;

     SUM(CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS DIFFERENCE

    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.PLT < 100 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS LowerThanNormal,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.PLT > 400 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS HigherThanNormal,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.PLT < 100 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.PLT > 400 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS Difference
FROM 
    Laboratory AS T1
JOIN 
    Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE YEAR(l.Date) = 1984
AND (YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.Birthday)) < 50
AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

FROM Laboratory l
INNER JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.Date) = 1984
AND (julianday('now') - julianday(p.Birthday)) / 365 < 50
AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

1243:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*)
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Examination E ON P.ID = E.ID
WHERE 
    DATEDIFF(YEAR, P.Birthday, GETDATE()) > 55
    AND E.PT >= 14;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'F' AND T2.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS percentage_female_with_abnormal_pt
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(GETDATE()), YEAR(T1.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN PT >= 14 THEN CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(CASE WHEN PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS FemalePercentage
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(p.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' AND L.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN L.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS PercentageFemaleWithAbnormalPT
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(P.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS PercentageFemaleWithAbnormalPT
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(P.Birthday)) > 55
    AND L.PT >= 14

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS percentage_female_with_abnormal_pt
FROM 
    Patient AS P
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(P.Birthday)) > 55
    AND L.PT >= 14;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 AND T1.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Percentage_Female_Abnormal_PT
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(T1.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS PercentageFemaleWithAbnormalPT
FROM 
    Patient p
INNER JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(p.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN Laboratory.PT >= 14 AND Patient.Sex = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS PercentageFemaleWithAbnormalPT
FROM Examination
JOIN Patient ON Examination.ID = Patient.ID
JOIN Laboratory ON Examination.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(Patient.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    COUNT(*) AS Percentage_Females_With_Abnormal_PT
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(p.Birthday)) > 55
    AND p.SEX = 'F'
    AND l.PT >= 14;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'F' AND T2.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS Percentage_Female_With_Abnormal_PT
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.Patient.ID
WHERE 
    YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - YEAR(T1.Birthday) > 55;

1032: SELECT league_id, COUNT(*) AS num_matches FROM Match GROUP BY league_id ORDER BY num_matches DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.name, COUNT(Match.id) as num_matches
FROM League AS T1
JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.league_id
GROUP BY T1.id
ORDER BY num_matches DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT league_id, COUNT(*) AS num_matches
FROM Match
GROUP BY league_id
ORDER BY num_matches DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.name, COUNT(Match.id) AS match_count
FROM League AS T1
JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.league_id
GROUP BY T1.name
ORDER BY match_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.name, COUNT(T2.league_id) AS match_count
FROM League AS T1
JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.league_id
GROUP BY T2.league_id
ORDER BY match_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT league_id, COUNT(*) AS match_count
FROM Match
GROUP BY league_id
ORDER BY match_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.name, COUNT(m.league_id) AS match_count
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY match_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.name, COUNT(T1.league_id) AS match_count
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id
GROUP BY T1.league_id
ORDER BY match_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT league_id, COUNT(*) AS num_matches FROM Match GROUP BY league_id ORDER BY num_matches DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT T2.name, COUNT(T1.league_id) AS match_count
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id
GROUP BY T1.league_id
ORDER BY match_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.name, COUNT(m.match_api_id) AS match_count
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY match_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.name, SUM(T1.home_team_goal + T1.away_team_goal) as total_goals
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id
WHERE T1.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY T2.name
ORDER BY total_goals DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.name, SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE m.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY total_goals DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.name
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id
WHERE T1.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY T2.name
ORDER BY SUM(T1.home_team_goal + T1.away_team_goal) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.name, SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE m.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY total_goals DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.name AS league_name
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id
WHERE T1.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY T2.name
ORDER BY SUM(T1.home_team_goal + T1.away_team_goal) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.name, SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id

SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.birthday, CURDATE()) AS age
FROM 
    Player p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE 
    pa.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND YEAR(pa.date) BETWEEN 2013 AND 2015;

SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday)) AS current_age
FROM 
    Player p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE 
    pa.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND strftime('%Y', pa.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015';

SELECT 
    p.player_api_id,
    p.player_name,
    strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS current_age
FROM 
    Player p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE 
    strftime('%Y', pa.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'
    AND pa.sprint_speed >= 97;

JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE 
    pa.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND YEAR(pa.date) BETWEEN 2013 AND 2015;

    T1.player_name,
    strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', T1.birthday) AS age
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND strftime('%Y', T2.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015';

WHERE T2.sprint_speed >= 97 AND strftime('%Y', T2.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015';

FROM Player AS T1
INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T2.sprint_speed >= 97 AND T2.date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2015-12-31';

    T1.player_api_id,
    T1.player_name,
    (strftime('%J', 'now') - strftime('%J', T1.birthday)) AS age,
    T2.sprint_speed
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'
GROUP BY
