SELECT 
    p.player_api_id, 
    p.player_name, 
    julianday('now') - julianday(p.birthday) AS age 
FROM 
    Player p 
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id 
JOIN 
    Match m ON p.player_api_id IN (m.home_player_1, m.home_player_2, m.home_player_3, m.home_player_4, m.home_player_5, m.home_player_6, m.home_player_7, m.home_player_8, m.home_player_9, m.home_player_10, m.home_player_11, m.away_player_1, m.away_player_2, m.away_player_3, m.away_player_4, m.away_player_5, m.away_player_6, m.away_player_7, m.away_player_8, m.away_player_9, m.away_player_10, m.away_player_11) 
WHERE 
    pa.sprint_speed >= 97 
    AND m.date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2015-12-31';

SELECT 
    (AVG(CASE WHEN T2.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T1.ball_control ELSE 0 END) -
     AVG(CASE WHEN T2.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T1.ball_control ELSE 0 END)) AS diff_ball_control
FROM 
    Player_Attributes AS T1
JOIN 
    Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) -
     AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END)) AS diff_avg_ball_control
FROM 
    Player AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) -
     AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END)) AS diff_ball_control
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T1.id ELSE NULL END)) -
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T1.id ELSE NULL END)) AS diff_avg_ball_control
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END)) -
       (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END)) AS diff_avg_ball_control
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN pa.ball_control ELSE 0 END)) -
    (AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN pa.ball_control ELSE 0 END)) AS diff_avg_ball_control
FROM 
    Player AS p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T1.player_name END)) -
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T1.player_name END)) AS diff_avg_ball_control
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) - 
       AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) AS difference_of_average_ball_control
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T1.id ELSE NULL END)) -
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T1.id ELSE NULL END)) AS diff_avg_ball_control
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(T2.ball_control) FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') -
    (SELECT AVG(T2.ball_control) FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye') AS diff

SELECT 
    (AVG(CASE WHEN T2.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T1.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / 
     COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T1.id ELSE NULL END)) -
    (AVG(CASE WHEN T2.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T1.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / 
     COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T1.id ELSE NULL END)) AS diff
FROM 
    Player_Attributes AS T1
JOIN 
    Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;
1058:
SELECT p.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) as avg_finishing
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height IN (
    SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player,
    SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player
)
GROUP BY p.player_name
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT AVG(T1.finishing) AS avg_finishing_higher
FROM Player_Attributes AS T1
JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T2.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
UNION ALL
SELECT AVG(T1.finishing) AS avg_finishing_lower
FROM Player_Attributes AS T1
JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T2.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)

SELECT p.player_api_id, p.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height IN (
    SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player,
    SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player
)
GROUP BY p.player_api_id, p.player_name
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.player_api_id, p.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing_rate
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height IN (
    SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player,
    SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player
)
GROUP BY p.player_api_id, p.player_name
ORDER BY avg_finishing_rate DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT player_api_id, player_name, finishing
FROM Player
WHERE player_api_id IN (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player
    WHERE height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
    OR height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
)
AND finishing = (
    SELECT MAX(AVG(finishing))
    FROM Player
    WHERE player_api_id IN (
        SELECT player_api_id
        FROM Player
        WHERE height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
        OR height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
    )
)

SELECT p.player_api_id, p.player_name, p.height, AVG(p.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player p
GROUP BY p.height
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT p.player_api_id, p.player_name, p.height, AVG(p.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player p
GROUP BY p.height
ORDER BY avg_finishing ASC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(T2.finishing) > AVG(CASE WHEN T1.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player) THEN T2.finishing ELSE NULL END) THEN 'Highest'
        ELSE 'Lowest'
    END AS height_group,
    AVG(T2.finishing) AS average_finishing_rate
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T1.height IN ((SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player), (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player))
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN T1.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player) THEN 'Highest'
        ELSE 'Lowest'
    END;

SELECT p1.player_api_id, p1.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing_high
FROM Player p1
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p1.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p1.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
GROUP BY p1.player_api_id, p1.player_name

UNION ALL

SELECT p2.player_api_id, p2.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing_low
FROM Player p2
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p2.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p2.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
GROUP BY p2.player_api_id, p2.player_name;

SELECT p.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height IN ((SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player), (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player))
GROUP BY p.player_name
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.player_api_id, T1.player_name
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
GROUP BY T1.id
HAVING AVG(T2.finishing) = (
    SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player) THEN AVG(T2.finishing) ELSE 0 END +
               CASE WHEN T1.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player) THEN AVG(T2.finishing) ELSE 0 END) / 2
    FROM Player AS T1
    JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
)

WITH TallAverage AS (
    SELECT AVG(T2.finishing) AS avg_finishing_tallest
    FROM Player AS T1
    JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
    WHERE T1.player_api_id IN (
        SELECT player_api_id FROM Player ORDER BY height DESC LIMIT 1
    )
),
ShortAverage AS (
    SELECT AVG(T2.finishing) AS avg_finishing_shortest
    FROM Player AS T1
    JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
    WHERE T1.player_api_id IN (
        SELECT player_api_id FROM Player ORDER BY height ASC LIMIT 1
    )
)
SELECT player_api_id, MAX(avg_finishing_tallest, avg_finishing_shortest) AS max_avg_finishing
FROM TallAverage, ShortAverage
ORDER BY max_avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(T2.chanceCreationPassing), T2.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'Ajax'

SELECT MAX(T2.chanceCreationPassing) AS max_chance_creation_passing, T2.chanceCreationPassingClass 
FROM Team AS T1 
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id 
WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'Ajax' 
ORDER BY T2.date DESC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(T2.chanceCreationPassing), T2.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'Ajax';

SELECT MAX(T2.chanceCreationPassing), T2.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'Ajax'

SELECT MAX(T2.chanceCreationPassing), T2.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'Ajax'

SELECT MAX(T3.chanceCreationPassing), T3.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.home_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id OR T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T3 ON T2.team_api_id = T3.team_api_id AND T1.date BETWEEN T3.date AND DATE_ADD(T3.date, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
WHERE T2.team_long_name = 'Ajax'

SELECT 
    MAX(T2.chanceCreationPassing) AS max_chance_creation_passing,
    T2.chanceCreationPassingClass AS classification
FROM 
    Team AS T1
JOIN 
    Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE 
    T1.team_long_name = 'Ajax'

SELECT MAX(T2.chanceCreationPassing), T2.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'Ajax'

SELECT MAX(T3.chanceCreationPassing), T3.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id IN (T2.home_team_api_id, T2.away_team_api_id)

SELECT ((T2.overall_rating - T3.overall_rating) * 100 / T3.overall_rating) AS percentage_increase
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.player_api_id = T3.player_api_id
WHERE T1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' AND T3.player_name = 'Paulin Puel';

SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes 
      JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id 
      WHERE Player.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk') - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes 
      JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id 
      WHERE Player.player_name = 'Paulin Puel')) * 100 / 
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes 
     JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id 
     WHERE Player.player_name = 'Paulin Puel') AS percentage_increase;

    ((p1.overall_rating - p2.overall_rating) / p2.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference

    Player_Attributes pa1
JOIN 
    Player p1 ON pa1.player_api_id = p1.player_api_id
JOIN

JOIN 
    Player p2 ON pa2.player_api_id = p2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    p1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' AND p2.player_name = 'Paulin Puel';

     -

     MAX(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE NULL END)) * 100 AS percentage_increase

SELECT 
    (CAST(T2.overall_rating AS REAL) - CAST(T3.overall_rating AS REAL)) * 100 / CAST(T2.overall_rating AS REAL) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.player_api_id = T3.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.date = '2013-07-12' AND T1.player_name IN ('Landon Donovan', 'Jordan Bowery')

SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Landon Donovan') AND date = '2013-07-12') 
    - 
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Jordan Bowery') AND date = '2013-07-12'))) * 100 / 
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Landon Donovan') AND date = '2013-07-12') AS percentage_difference;

SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND date = '2013-07-12') 
     - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' AND date = '2013-07-12')) * 100 /
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND date = '2013-07-12') AS percentage_increase;

SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS p JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND pa.date = '2013/7/12') - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS p JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' AND pa.date = '2013/7/12')) * 100 /
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS p JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND pa.date = '2013/7/12') AS percentage_difference;

SELECT 
    ((P1.overall_rating - P2.overall_rating) / P1.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS P1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS PA1 ON P1.player_api_id = PA1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player AS P2 ON P2.player_api_id = PA2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    PA1.date = '2013-07-12' AND PA2.date = '2013-07-12'
    AND P1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND P2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery';

SELECT 
    ((p1.overall_rating - p2.overall_rating) / p1.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS p1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS pa1 ON p1.player_api_id = pa1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player AS p2 ON p2.player_api_id = pa2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    pa1.date = '2013-07-12'
    AND p1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
    AND p2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END)) * 100 /
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.date = '2013-07-12';

SELECT 
    ((T2.overall_rating - T3.overall_rating) / T2.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id AND T2.date = '2013-07-12'
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.player_api_id = T3.player_api_id AND T3.date = '2013-07-12'
WHERE 
    T1.player_name IN ('Landon Donovan', 'Jordan Bowery')

SELECT 
    ((P1.overall_rating - P2.overall_rating) / P1.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS P1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS PA1 ON P1.player_api_id = PA1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player AS P2 ON P2.player_api_id = PA2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    PA1.date = '2013-07-12' AND 
    P1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND 
    P2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'

SELECT 
    (P1.overall_rating - P2.overall_rating) * 100.0 / P1.overall_rating AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS P1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS PA1 ON P1.player_api_id = PA1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player AS P2 ON P2.player_api_id = PA2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    PA1.date = '2013-07-12' AND P1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
AND 
    PA2.date = '2013-07-12' AND P2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) - 
      SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageDifference
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.date = '2013/7/12';

WHERE Player.player_name = 'Marko Arnautovic'
AND Player_Attributes.date LIKE '2007%'

SELECT p.player_name FROM Player_Attributes pa JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id WHERE pa.attacking_work_rate = 'high';
SELECT T2.player_name FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.attacking_work_rate = 'High'
SELECT DISTINCT T2.player_name FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.attacking_work_rate = 'High'
SELECT DISTINCT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.attacking_work_rate = 'High'

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE pa.attacking_work_rate = 'High';

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON (m.home_player_1 = p.player_api_id OR m.away_player_1 = p.player_api_id)
WHERE p.attacking_work_rate = 'High'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Player_Attributes pa2
    JOIN Match m2 ON (m2.home_player_1 = pa2.player_api_id OR m2.away_player_1 = pa2.player_api_id)
    WHERE pa2.attacking_work_rate = 'High'
);

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player p
JOIN Match m ON (p.player_api_id IN (m.home_player_1, m.home_player_2, m.home_player_3, m.home_player_4, m.home_player_5, m.home_player_6, m.home_player_7, m.home_player_8, m.home_player_9, m.home_player_10, m.home_player_11))
WHERE p.attacking_work_rate = 'High'
AND (m.home_player_1 IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE attacking_work_rate = 'High') OR m.home_player_2 IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE attacking_work_rate = 'High')
OR m.home_player_3 IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE attacking_work_rate = 'High') OR m.home_player_4 IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE attacking_work_rate = 'High')
OR m.home_player_5 IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE attacking_work_rate = 'High') OR m.home_player_6 IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE attacking_work_rate = 'High')
OR m.home_player_7 IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE attacking_work_rate = 'High') OR m.home_player_8 IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE attacking_work_rate = 'High')
OR m.home_player_9 IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE attacking_work_rate = 'High') OR m.home_player_10 IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE attacking_work_rate = 'High'))

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Match m
    JOIN Player_Attributes p2 ON m.home_player_1 = p2.player_api_id OR m.away_player_1 = p2.player_api_id
    WHERE (p.player_api_id = p2.player_api_id)
    AND p2.attacking_work_rate = 'High'
);

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Match m ON pa.player_api_id IN (m.home_player_1, m.home_player_2, m.home_player_3, m.home_player_4, m.home_player_5, m.home_player_6, m.home_player_7, m.home_player_8, m.home_player_9, m.home_player_10, m.home_player_11)
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE pa.attacking_work_rate = 'High'
AND (
    (pa.player_api_id IN (m.away_player_1, m.away_player_2, m.away_player_3, m.away_player_4, m.away_player_5, m.away_player_6, m.away_player_7, m.away_player_8, m.away_player_9, m.away_player_10, m.away_player_11) AND p.player_api_id IN (m.away_player_1, m.away_player_2, m.away_player_3, m.away_player_4, m.away_player_5, m.away_player_6, m.away_player_7, m.away_player_8, m.away_player_9, m.away_player_10, m.away_player_11))
    OR
    (p.player_api_id IN (m.away_player_1, m.away_player_2, m.away_player_3, m.away_player_4, m.away_player_5, m.away_player_6, m.away_player_7, m.away_player_8, m.away_player_9, m.away_player_10, m.away_player_11) AND pa.player_api_id IN (m.away_player_1, m.away_player_2, m.away_player_3, m.away_player_4, m.away_player_5, m.away_player_6, m.away_player_7, m.away_player_8, m.away_player_9, m.away_player_10, m.away_player_11))
);

SELECT DISTINCT T1.home_player_1, T1.home_player_2, T1.home_player_3, T1.home_player_4, T1.home_player_5,
                    T1.home_player_6, T1.home_player_7, T1.home_player_8, T1.home_player_9, T1.home_player_10,
                    T1.home_player_11,
                    T1.away_player_1, T1.away_player_2, T1.away_player_3, T1.away_player_4, T1.away_player_5,
                    T1.away_player_6, T1.away_player_7, T1.away_player_8, T1.away_player_9, T1.away_player_10,
                    T1.away_player_11
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.home_player_1 = T2.player_api_id OR T1.away_player_1 = T2.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.home_player_2 = T3.player_api_id OR T1.away_player_2 = T3.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T4 ON T1.home_player_3 = T4.player_api_id OR T1.away_player_3 = T4.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T5 ON T1.home_player_4 = T5.player_api_id OR T1.away_player_4 = T5.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T6 ON T1.home_player_5 = T6.player_api_id OR T1.away_player_5 = T6.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T7 ON T1.home_player_6 = T7.player_api_id OR T1.away_player_6 = T7.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T8 ON T1.home_player_7 = T8.player_api_id OR T1.away_player_7 = T8.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T9 ON T1.home_player_8 = T9.player_api_id OR T1.away_player_8 = T9.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T10 ON T1.home_player_9 = T10.player_api_id OR T1.away_player_9 = T10.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T11 ON T1.home_player_10 = T11.player_api_id OR T1.away_player_10 = T11.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T12 ON T1.home_player_11 = T12.player_api_id OR T1.away_player_11 = T12.player_api_id
WHERE T2.attacking_work_rate = 'High' AND T3.attacking_work_rate = 'High' AND T4.attacking_work_rate = 'High'
  AND T5.attacking_work_rate = 'High' AND T6.attacking_work_rate = 'High' AND T7.attacking_work_rate = 'High'
  AND T8.attacking_work_rate = 'High' AND T9.attacking_work_rate = 'High' AND T10.attacking_work_rate = 'High'
  AND T11.attacking_work_rate = 'High' AND T12.attacking_work_rate = 'High';

JOIN status ON results.statusid = status.statusid
WHERE races.name = 'Bahrain Grand Prix'
AND races.year = 2007
AND status.status = 'Not Finished';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT drivers.driverId) AS numberOfDriversNotFinished
FROM drivers
JOIN results ON drivers.driverId = results.driverId
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE races.name = 'Bahrain Grand Prix'
AND races.year = 2007
AND results.time IS NULL;

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.time IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS non_finished_drivers
FROM results AS T1
JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid
WHERE T2.year = 2007 AND T2.name = 'Bahrain Grand Prix'

SELECT COUNT(*) - SUM(CASE WHEN results.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS drivers_not_finished
FROM races
JOIN results ON races.raceid = results.raceid
WHERE races.name = 'Bahrain Grand Prix' AND races.year = 2007;

FROM races AS r

WHERE r.name = 'Bahrain Grand Prix' AND r.year = 2007 AND res.time IS NULL;

FROM results AS T1
JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid

WHERE races.date = '1983-07-16'

880:
SELECT 
    (CAST((T2.fastestlapspeed - T3.fastestlapspeed) AS REAL) / T2.fastestlapspeed) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T2.raceid = 853
JOIN 
    results AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid AND T3.raceid = 854
WHERE 
    T1.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND T1.surname = 'di Resta'

SELECT 
    (MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 853 THEN r.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END) - 
     MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 854 THEN r.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END)) * 100 / 
    MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 853 THEN r.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END) AS percentage_faster
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Paul' AND d.surname = 'di Resta';

SELECT 
    ((T2.fastestlapspeed - T3.fastestlapspeed) / T2.fastestlapspeed) * 100 AS percentage_faster
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T2.raceid = 853
JOIN 
    results AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid AND T3.raceid = 854
WHERE 
    T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta';

SELECT 
    CAST((MAX(CASE WHEN T1.raceId = 853 THEN T2.fastestlapspeed END) - MAX(CASE WHEN T1.raceId = 854 THEN T2.fastestlapspeed END)) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    MAX(CASE WHEN T1.raceId = 853 THEN T2.fastestlapspeed END) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN 
    drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE 
    T3.forename = 'Paul' AND T3.surname = 'di Resta';

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN T2.raceid = 853 THEN T2.fastestlapspeed END) - MAX(CASE WHEN T2.raceid = 854 THEN T2.fastestlapspeed END)) / 
    MAX(CASE WHEN T2.raceid = 853 THEN T2.fastestlapspeed END)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN 
    races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE 
    T1.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND T1.surname = 'di Resta'

SELECT ((T2.fastestlapspeed - T3.fastestlapspeed) / T3.fastestlapspeed * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T2.raceid = 853
JOIN results AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid AND T3.raceid = 854
WHERE T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta'

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceId = 853 THEN r2.fastestlapspeed END) - MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceid = 854 THEN r2.fastestlapspeed END)) / 
     MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceId = 853 THEN r2.fastestlapspeed END)) * 100 AS percentage_change
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN 
    races r1 ON r.raceid = r1.raceid
LEFT JOIN 
    results r2 ON d.driverid = r2.driverid AND r1.year = r2.year AND r1.round = r2.round + 1
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND d.surname = 'di Resta'

SELECT ((AVG(T2.fastestlapspeed) - AVG(T2.fastestlapspeed)) / AVG(T2.fastestlapspeed)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta' AND T3.raceid IN (853, 854)

SELECT 
    ((r1.fastestlapspeed - r2.fastestlapspeed) / r1.fastestlapspeed) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results r1
JOIN 
    results r2 ON r2.driverid = r1.driverid AND r2.raceid = r1.raceid + 1
JOIN 
    drivers d ON d.driverid = r1.driverid
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
    AND r1.raceid = 853;

SELECT CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 853 THEN rs.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) - CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 854 THEN rs.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 853 THEN rs.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END) AS percentage_difference
FROM drivers d
JOIN results rs ON d.driverid = rs.driverid
JOIN races r ON rs.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE d.forename = 'Paul' AND d.surname = 'di Resta'

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceId = 853 THEN r1.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END) - 
     MAX(CASE WHEN r2.raceId = 854 THEN r2.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END)) / 
    MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceId = 853 THEN r1.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results r1
JOIN 
    results r2 ON r1.driverid = r2.driverid AND r1.raceid < r2.raceid
JOIN 
    drivers d ON r1.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
    AND r1.raceid = 853;

897:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid AND r.raceid = ds.raceid
WHERE r.position = 1
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY COUNT(r.position) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY COUNT(ds.wins) DESC, total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY COUNT(ds.wins) DESC, total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, MAX(ds.points)
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
ORDER BY COUNT(ds.wins) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality
ORDER BY COUNT(ds.wins) DESC, total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, ds.points
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY ds.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.nationality, T2.points 
FROM drivers AS T1 
JOIN driverstandings AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid 
GROUP BY T1.driverid 
ORDER BY COUNT(T2.wins) DESC 
LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.nationality, SUM(T2.points) AS total_points, COUNT(T2.wins) AS total_wins
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN driverstandings AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
GROUP BY T1.driverid
ORDER BY total_wins DESC, total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, SUM(r.points) AS total_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE r.status = 'Winner'
GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.nationality, SUM(T2.points) AS total_points
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN driverstandings AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
GROUP BY T1.driverid
ORDER BY COUNT(T2.wins) DESC, total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, ds.points
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
WHERE ds.wins > 0
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, ds.points
ORDER BY ds.wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

944:
SELECT 
    ((MAX(T2.milliseconds) - MIN(T2.milliseconds)) / MAX(T2.milliseconds)) * 100 AS percentage_faster
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
WHERE 
    T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'

SELECT 
    ((strftime('%J', T2.time) - strftime('%J', MIN(T2.time))) * 86400 * 1000) / strftime('%J', MIN(T2.time)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN 
    drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid
WHERE 
    T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'

SELECT 
    ((CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING(time, 4), ':', '') AS REAL) / 1000) - 
     (CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING((SELECT MIN(time) FROM results WHERE raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND NAME = 'Australian Grand Prix')), 4), ':', '') AS REAL) / 1000)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results 
JOIN 
    driverstandings ON results.driverid = driverstandings.driverid 
JOIN 
    races ON results.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE 
    races.year = 2008 AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T4.time, INSTR(T4.time, ':'), LENGTH(T4.time)) AS REAL) / 1000 - 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T5.time, INSTR(T5.time, ':'), LENGTH(T5.time)) AS REAL) / 1000) * 100) / 
    CAST(SUBSTR(T4.time, INSTR(T4.time, ':'), LENGTH(T4.time)) AS REAL) / 1000 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    driverstandings AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN 
    races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
JOIN 
    results AS T4 ON T3.raceid = T4.raceid AND T4.position = 1
JOIN 
    results AS T5 ON T3.raceid = T5.raceid AND T5.position = (SELECT MAX(position) FROM results WHERE raceid = T3.raceid)
WHERE 
    T3.year = 2008 AND T3.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    ((CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING(r1.time, INSTR(r1.time, ':') + 1, 9), '.', '') AS REAL) / 1000) - 
     (CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING(r2.time, INSTR(r2.time, ':') + 1, 9), '.', '') AS REAL) / 1000)) * 100 AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    results r1
JOIN 
    results r2 ON r1.driverid = r2.driverid AND r1.raceid = r2.raceid
JOIN 
    driverstandings ds ON r1.driverid = ds.driverid AND r1.raceid = ds.raceid
JOIN 
    races ON r1.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE 
    races.year = 2008 AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
ORDER BY 
    ds.points DESC, r1.position ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1) AS REAL) * 1000 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) /
    (CAST(SUBSTR(T3.time, INSTR(T3.time, ':') + 1) AS REAL) * 1000 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(T3.time, INSTR(T3.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL))) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid AND T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
JOIN 
    results AS T3 ON T1.raceid = T3.raceid AND T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
JOIN 
    drivers AS T4 ON T2.driverid = T4.driverid
JOIN 
    drivers AS T5 ON T3.driverid = T5.driverid
WHERE 
    T2.position = 1 -- champion
    AND T3.position = (SELECT MAX(position) FROM results WHERE raceid = T1.raceid) -- last place

SELECT 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 * 1000 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1), '.') - 1) AS REAL) * 1000 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1), 1, LENGTH(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1)) - 1) AS REAL)) / 1000 - 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 * 1000 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1), '.') - 1) AS REAL) * 1000 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1), 1, LENGTH(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1)) - 1) AS REAL)) / 1000) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
WHERE 
    T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
ORDER BY 
    T2.position DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, ':') + 1, LENGTH(T1.time)) AS REAL) / 1000) -
     (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, ':') + 1, LENGTH(T1.time)) AS REAL) / 1000)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN 
    drivers AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid
WHERE 
    T2.year = 2008 AND T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T1.position IS NOT NULL;

WITH champion_last_place AS (
    SELECT 
        r1.time AS champion_time,
        r2.time AS last_place_time
    FROM results r1
    JOIN results r2 ON r1.raceid = r2.raceid
    WHERE r1.driverid = (SELECT driverid FROM driverstandings WHERE year = 2008 AND position = 1)
      AND r2.driverid = (SELECT driverid FROM results WHERE position = (SELECT MAX(position) FROM results WHERE raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix')))
)
SELECT 
    champion_time,
    last_place_time,
    ((julianday(last_place_time) - julianday(champion_time)) * 100) AS percentage_increase
FROM champion_last_place;

WITH race_data AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM races
    JOIN results ON races.raceid = results.raceid
    WHERE races.year = 2008 AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
),
champion AS (
    SELECT results.driverid, results.position, results.time, results.points
    FROM results
    JOIN driverstandings ON results.driverid = driverstandings.driverid
    WHERE driverstandings.season = 2008
    ORDER BY results.points DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
last_place AS (
    SELECT results.driverid, results.position, results.time
    FROM results
    WHERE results.raceid IN (
        SELECT races.raceid
        FROM races
        WHERE races.year = 2008 AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
    )
    ORDER BY results.position ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    (CAST(champion.time AS REAL) - CAST(last_place.time AS REAL)) * 100 / CAST(last_place.time AS REAL) AS percentage_increase
FROM champion, last_place;

WITH RankedResults AS (
    SELECT r.raceid, r.date, r.name, d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, 
           TIME_TO_SEC(rlt.time) * 1000 AS milliseconds,
           RANK() OVER (ORDER BY TIME_TO_SEC(rlt.time) DESC) AS rank
    FROM races AS r
    JOIN results AS rlt ON r.raceid = rlt.raceid
    JOIN drivers AS d ON rlt.driverid = d.driverid
    WHERE r.year = 2008 AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND rlt.time IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    champion_milliseconds, 
    last_place_milliseconds,
    ((champion_milliseconds - last_place_milliseconds) / last_place_milliseconds) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM RankedResults
ORDER BY rank
LIMIT 1, 1;

955:
SELECT AVG(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, ':'), LENGTH(T1.time)) AS REAL) AS REAL) / 1000 AS avg_time_seconds, T2.year
FROM results AS T1
JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE T2.wins > 0 AND T1.year < 1975 AND T1.time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY T2.year;

SELECT AVG(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CONCAT(T2.time, '.000')) / 1000) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.championship = 1 AND T3.year < 1975;

SELECT AVG((TIME_TO_SEC(T2.time)) / 1000) AS avg_time_seconds, T3.year
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
JOIN driverstandings AS T4 ON T1.driverid = T4.driverid AND T3.raceid = T4.raceid
WHERE T1.wins > 0 AND T3.year < 1975
GROUP BY T3.year;

SELECT AVG(CAST(LEFT(time, 2) AS INT) * 3600 + CAST(SUBSTR(time, 4, 2) AS INT) * 60 + CAST(RIGHT(time, 3) AS INT)) / 1000 AS avg_time_seconds
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races rs ON r.raceid = rs.raceid
WHERE rs.year < 1975 AND d.status = 'champion';

SELECT 
    YEAR(races), 
    AVG(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(results.time, 1, INSTR(results.time, ':') - 1), ':', SUBSTRING(results.time, INSTR(results.time, ':'), INSTR(results.time, '.') - INSTR(results.time, ':')), ':', SUBSTRING(results.time, INSTR(results.time, '.'), LENGTH(results.time)))))) / 1 AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    results
JOIN 
    races ON results.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN 
    driverstandings ON results.driverid = driverstandings.driverid AND results.raceid = driverstandings.raceid
WHERE 
    driverstandings.position = 1 AND 
    YEAR(races) < 1975
GROUP BY 
    YEAR(races);

SELECT 
    YEAR(races.date) AS race_year,
    AVG(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CONCAT(results.time, ' ', SUBSTRING(races.time FROM 1 FOR 8))) - UNIX_TIMESTAMP('00:00:00')) / COUNT(*) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    drivers
JOIN 
    results ON drivers.driverid = results.driverid
JOIN 
    races ON results.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE 
    YEAR(races.date) < 1975 AND results.time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    YEAR(races.date);

SELECT AVG((TIME_PART('hour', T2.time) * 3600 + TIME_PART('minute', T2.time) * 60 + TIME_PART('second', T2.time)) / 1000) AS avg_time_seconds, T1.year
FROM races AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid AND T1.season < 1975
WHERE T2.position = 1
GROUP BY T1.year;

SELECT 
    YEAR(races.date) AS race_year,
    AVG(
        TIME_TO_SEC(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, '00:00:00', results.time))
    ) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    drivers
JOIN 
    results ON drivers.driverid = results.driverid
JOIN 
    races ON results.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE 
    YEAR(races.date) < 1975 AND
    results.position = 1
GROUP BY 
    YEAR(races.date);

SELECT 
    YEAR,
    AVG(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TIME, '.', 1), ':', '') AS UNSIGNED) * 3600 + 
        CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TIME, '.', -2), ':', 1) AS UNSIGNED) * 60 + 
        CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TIME, '.', -1), ':', 1) AS UNSIGNED)) / COUNT(*) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON ds.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE 
    YEAR < 1975
GROUP BY 
    YEAR;

SELECT 
    YEAR(races.date) AS race_year,
    AVG(
        CAST(LEFT(results.time, INSTR(results.time, ':') - 1) AS UNSIGNED) * 3600 +
        MEDIUMINT(MID(results.time, INSTR(results.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(results.time, ':', 2) - INSTR(results.time, ':') - 1)) * 60 +
        RIGHT(results.time, LENGTH(results.time) - INSTR(results.time, '.') - 3)
    ) / 1000 AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    results
JOIN 
    races ON results.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE 
    YEAR(races.date) < 1975 AND results.position = 1
GROUP BY 
    YEAR(races.date);

SELECT 
    YEAR,
    AVG(
        SUBSTR(TIME, 1, INSTR(TIME, ':') - 1) * 3600 + 
        SUBSTR(TIME, INSTR(TIME, ':') + 1, INSTR(TIME, ':', INSTR(TIME, ':') + 1) - INSTR(TIME, ':') - 1) * 60 + 
        SUBSTR(TIME, INSTR(TIME, ':', INSTR(TIME, ':') + 1) + 1) / 1000
    ) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN 
    races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE 
    d.driverid IN (
        SELECT 
            driverid
        FROM 
            driverstandings
        WHERE 
            position = 1
    )
    AND ra.year < 1975
GROUP BY 
    YEAR;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.driverId)
FROM drivers d
JOIN laptimes l ON d.driverid = l.driverid
WHERE d.nationality = 'French'
AND l.milliseconds / 1000 < 120;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.driverid)
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN laptimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
WHERE d.nationality = 'French' AND lt.milliseconds < 120;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.driverId)
FROM drivers d
INNER JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
INNER JOIN laps l ON r.resultId = l.resultId
WHERE d.nationality = 'French'
AND l.milliseconds < 120000;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.driverId)
FROM drivers d
JOIN laptimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
WHERE d.nationality = 'French'
AND TIME_TO_SEC(lt.time) < 120;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.driverId)
FROM drivers d
JOIN laptimes l ON d.driverid = l.driverid
WHERE d.nationality = 'French' AND CAST(SUBSTR(l.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60 + CAST(SUBSTR(l.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER) < 120;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT drivers.driverId)
FROM drivers
JOIN laps ON drivers.driverId = laps.driverId
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'French'
AND SUBSTR(laps.time, INSTR(laps.time, ':') + 1) < '120'

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN laptimes AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid AND T1.driverid = T3.driverid
WHERE T1.nationality = 'French'
AND SUBSTR(T3.time, 4, 2) || SUBSTR(T3.time, 7, 2) < '120';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.driverId)
FROM drivers d
JOIN laps l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality LIKE 'French'
AND SUBSTR(l.time, INSTR(l.time, ':') + 1, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(l.time, 1, 2) < '02:00'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.driverId) AS french_drivers_with_fast_laptimes
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN laps AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.nationality = 'French'
AND T3.milliseconds < 120000;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.driverid) AS french_drivers_with_fast_lap_times
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN laptimes AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE T1.nationality = 'French'
AND CAST(REPLACE(T2.time, ':', '') AS INTEGER) < 120;

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN laps AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE T1.nationality = 'French'
AND SUBSTR(T2.milliseconds, 1, INSTR(T2.milliseconds, ':') - 1) * 60 < 120;

977: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results AS r JOIN status AS s ON r.statusid = s.statusid WHERE s.status = 'Disqualified' AND r.raceid BETWEEN 50 AND 100;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT driverid) FROM results WHERE raceid BETWEEN 50 AND 100 AND statusid != 2 AND TIME IS NOT NULL;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.driverId) AS numberOfDisqualifications
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE r.raceId BETWEEN 50 AND 99
AND s.status = 'disqualified';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusid = s.statusid
WHERE r.statusid = 2 AND r.raceid BETWEEN 50 AND 99 AND r.time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results AS T1 JOIN status AS T2 ON T1.statusid = T2.statusid WHERE T1.statusid = 2 AND T1.raceid BETWEEN 50 AND 100;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.driverid)
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN status AS s ON res.statusid = s.statusid
WHERE r.raceid BETWEEN 50 AND 100
AND s.status = 'Disqualified';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT driverId) AS numberOfDisqualifiedFinishers
FROM results
JOIN status ON results.statusId = status.statusId
WHERE status.statusId = 2 AND raceId BETWEEN 50 AND 100;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results AS r 
INNER JOIN status AS s ON r.statusid = s.statusid 
WHERE r.raceid BETWEEN 50 AND 100 
AND r.time IS NOT NULL 
AND s.statusid = 2;

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM results AS T1
JOIN status AS T2 ON T1.statusid = T2.statusid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T1.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T3.raceid BETWEEN 50 AND 100
AND T2.status = 'Disqualified'

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN statusID = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS num_disqualified,
    COUNT(*) AS total_finishers
FROM 
    results
WHERE 
    raceId BETWEEN 50 AND 100
    AND time IS NOT NULL;

FROM races r
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON r.raceid = cs.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON cs.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND cs.position = 1;

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorStandings cs ON c.constructorId = cs.constructorId
JOIN races r ON cs.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY cs.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorStandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cs.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND cs.position = 1;

JOIN results AS r ON c.constructorid = r.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.year = 2009 AND ra.name = 'Singapore'
ORDER BY r.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url

JOIN races r ON cs.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.season = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'

LIMIT 1;

FROM constructors c

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.date, r.time
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE q.date = (
    SELECT MIN(q2.date)
    FROM qualifying q2
)
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.year, r.name, r.date, r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceid = q.raceid
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT r.year, r.date, r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceid = q.raceid
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    MIN(q.date) AS first_qualifying_date,
    YEAR(MIN(q.date)) AS first_qualifying_year,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    r.name AS race_name,
    r.date AS race_date,
    r.time AS race_time
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
ORDER BY 
    d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT r.year, r.date, r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceid = q.raceid AND r.year = q.year
WHERE q.driverid = (
    SELECT q2.driverid
    FROM qualifying q2
    ORDER BY q2.driverid, q2.q1 ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY r.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    YEAR(q1) AS year,
    r.name AS race_name,
    r.date AS race_date,
    r.time AS race_time
FROM 
    qualifying q
JOIN 
    drivers d ON q.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE 
    q.q1 = (
        SELECT 
            MIN(q1)
        FROM 
            qualifying
        WHERE 
            driverid = q.driverid
    )
ORDER BY 
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, d.dob, q.q1) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, r.date, r.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.year, T1.name, T1.date, T1.time 
FROM races AS T1 
JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid 
WHERE T2.driverid = (
    SELECT driverid 
    FROM drivers 
    ORDER BY dob DESC 
    LIMIT 1
) 
AND T2.q1 IS NOT NULL AND T2.q2 IS NOT NULL AND T2.q3 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY T1.date ASC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT r.year, d.name, r.date, r.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE q.qualifyid IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.dob ASC, r.date ASC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT DISTINCT T3.year, T3.name, T3.date, T3.time FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid ORDER BY T1.dob ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, r.year, r.round, r.date, r.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE q.date = (
    SELECT MIN(date)
    FROM qualifying
    WHERE driverid = d.driverid
)
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.nationality, T2.raceid 
FROM drivers AS T1 
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid 
WHERE T1.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers);

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, d.nationality, r.name AS raceName
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
WHERE d.dob = (
    SELECT MIN(dob)
    FROM drivers
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverid = res.driverid
JOIN races r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name AS first_race_name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers)
ORDER BY r.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, d.nationality, r.name AS firstRaceName
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverid = res.driverid
JOIN races r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverid = res.driverid
JOIN races r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;

FROM drivers d

JOIN races r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverid = res.driverid
JOIN races r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers)

SELECT T1.forename || ' ' || T1.surname AS fullname, T1.nationality, T2.name AS first_race
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE T1.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
ORDER BY T1.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.points, ct.name, ct.nationality
FROM constructorResults AS cr
JOIN constructors AS ct ON cr.constructorid = ct.constructorid
JOIN races AS r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY cr.constructorid
ORDER BY SUM(c.points) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(constructorStandings.points) AS total_points, constructors.name, constructors.nationality
FROM constructorStandings
JOIN races ON constructorStandings.raceId = races.raceId
JOIN constructors ON constructorStandings.constructorId = constructors.constructorId
WHERE races.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND races.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY constructors.constructorId
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name, c.nationality, cr.points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorResults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.racename LIKE '%Monaco%' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
ORDER BY cr.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorid, SUM(cr.points) AS total_points, c.name, c.nationality
FROM races r
JOIN constructorresults cr ON r.raceid = cr.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorid
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorid, c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cs.points) as total_points
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races AS r ON cs.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorid
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(c.constructorid), c.name, c.nationality
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorresults AS cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races AS r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorid, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY SUM(cr.points) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(c.constructorid), c.name, c.nationality
FROM races AS r
JOIN constructorresults AS cr ON r.raceid = cr.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON cr.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
AND r.name LIKE '%Monaco%'
GROUP BY c.constructorid, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY SUM(cr.points) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorid, SUM(r.points), c.name, c.nationality
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010 AND r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix'
GROUP BY c.constructorid
ORDER BY SUM(r.points) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorid, c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cs.points) as total_points
FROM races r
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON r.raceid = cs.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON cs.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.circuitid IN (
    SELECT circuitid FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Monaco Grand Prix'
)
AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorid, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.points, ct.name, ct.nationality
FROM constructorResults AS cr
INNER JOIN constructors AS ct ON cr.constructorid = ct.constructorid
INNER JOIN races AS r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.circuitid IN (
    SELECT circuitid
    FROM circuits
    WHERE name = 'Monaco Grand Prix'
)
AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY cr.constructorid
ORDER BY SUM(c.points) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(c.constructorStandings.points) AS total_points, c.name, c.nationality
FROM constructorStandings cs
JOIN races r ON cs.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON cs.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.name LIKE '%Monaco%' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

FROM circuits c
JOIN results r ON c.circuitid = r.circuitid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY r.milliseconds DESC;

SELECT c.name AS CircuitName, MIN(l.time) AS FastestLapTime
FROM circuits c
JOIN laps l ON c.circuitid = l.circuitid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
GROUP BY c.name;

SELECT l.driverId, l.time, l.milliseconds
FROM laps l
JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
GROUP BY l.driverId;

SELECT l.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN laps l ON d.driverid = l.driverid
JOIN races r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy';

SELECT DISTINCT l.time
FROM laps l
JOIN races r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy';

SELECT r.time 
FROM circuits c
JOIN races ra ON c.circuitid = ra.circuitid
JOIN results re ON ra.raceid = re.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON re.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY r.time;

SELECT c.name AS circuitName, MIN(l.time) AS fastestLapTime
FROM circuits c
JOIN laps l ON c.circuitid = l.circuitid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'

SELECT l.time 
FROM laps AS l
JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy';

SELECT l.time
FROM circuits c

JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN laps l ON res.driverid = l.driverid AND res.raceid = l.raceid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy';

SELECT DISTINCT l.time
FROM circuits c
JOIN results r ON c.circuitid = r.circuitid
JOIN laps l ON r.raceid = l.raceid AND r.driverid = l.driverid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY l.time;

SELECT DISTINCT d.forename, d.surname, l.fastestLapTime
FROM circuits c
JOIN races r ON c.circuitid = r.circuitid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN laps l ON d.driverid = l.driverid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY l.fastestLapTime;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_accidents
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusid = s.statusid
JOIN races ON r.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE races.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND s.status = 'Accident'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS accident_count
FROM results r
JOIN races rr ON r.raceid = rr.raceid
WHERE rr.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND r.statusid = 3;

SELECT d.driverId, COUNT(r.resultId) AS accidentCount
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND s.status = 'Accident'
GROUP BY d.driverId
ORDER BY accidentCount DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS numberOfAccidents
FROM results
WHERE raceId IN (
    SELECT raceId
    FROM races
    WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
)
AND statusid = 3;

SELECT d.driverId, COUNT(r.resultId) AS accident_count
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE r.raceId IN (
    SELECT raceId
    FROM races
    WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
)
AND s.statusId = 3
GROUP BY d.driverId
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.driverId, COUNT(r.resultId) AS accident_count
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadain Grand Prix' AND s.status = 'Accident'
GROUP BY d.driverId
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS accident_count
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
AND r.statusid = 3;

SELECT d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, COUNT(*) AS num_accidents
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN status s ON res.statusid = s.statusid
WHERE r.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND s.statusid = 3
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY num_accidents DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(accident_count) AS max_accidents
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS accident_count
    FROM races r
    JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
    JOIN status s ON res.statusid = s.statusid
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
    WHERE r.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND s.statusid = 3
    GROUP BY d.driverid
) subquery;

SELECT T2.driverId, SUM(CASE WHEN T3.status = 'Accident' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS num_accidents
FROM races AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN status AS T3 ON T2.statusid = T3.statusid
WHERE T1.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
GROUP BY T2.driverId
ORDER BY num_accidents DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_accidents FROM results WHERE raceId IN (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix') AND statusId = 3 GROUP BY driverId ORDER BY num_accidents DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, l.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
ORDER BY l.time ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
ORDER BY TIME(l.time)
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, lt.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN laptimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
WHERE lt.time = (SELECT MIN(lt2.time) FROM laptimes lt2)
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN lapTimes AS lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
ORDER BY CAST(SUBSTR(lt.time, 4) AS REAL) ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN laptimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
WHERE lt.time = (SELECT MIN(time) FROM laptimes)
ORDER BY lt.lap ASC, lt.position ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN laptimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(lt.time, ':', '') AS REAL)
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN laptimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
WHERE lt.time IS NOT NULL AND lt.milliseconds IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, MIN(l.time) AS min_lap_time
FROM drivers d
JOIN laptimes l ON d.driverid = l.driverid
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY min_lap_time ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, l.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
GROUP BY d.driverId
ORDER BY SUM(LEFT(l.time, INSTR(l.time, ':') - 1) * 60 + RIGHT(l.time, LENGTH(l.time) - INSTR(l.time, ':'))) / 1000) ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN laptimes AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid WHERE T3.url LIKE '%formula%1%' ORDER BY T2.time ASC LIMIT 20;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN laptimes AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid WHERE T3.name LIKE '%Formula 1%' ORDER BY T2.time ASC LIMIT 20

FROM superhero s

JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
GROUP BY c.colour
ORDER BY eye_color_count DESC;

SELECT 
    ROUND((CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.id)) * 100, 2) AS percentage_bad,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' AND T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS count_marvel_bad
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T1.alignment = 'Bad';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) AS percentage_bad_alignment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' AND T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_marvel_bad_alignment
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_bad_alignment,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics') AND T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS count_marvel_bad_alignment
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id;

SELECT 
    ((COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0) / COUNT(T1.id)) AS percentage_bad_alignments,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' AND T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS bad_alignments_published_by_marvel
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
LEFT JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id;

    alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.skin_colour_id IN (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE colour = 'Blue') THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    COUNT(*) AS percentage_blue_females
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T2.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero WHERE gender_id = (SELECT id FROM gender WHERE gender = 'Female') )) AS percentage
FROM 
    superhero
WHERE 
    gender_id = (SELECT id FROM gender WHERE gender = 'Female')
    AND skin_colour_id IN (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE colour = 'Blue');

SELECT 
    ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.skin_colour_id IN (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE colour = 'Blue') THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(T1.id)) * 100, 2) AS percentage
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T2.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.skin_colour_id = T2.id AND T1.gender_id = (SELECT id FROM gender WHERE gender = 'Female') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.id)) * 100) AS percentage
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    colour AS T2 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T2.id;

SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero WHERE gender_id IN (SELECT id FROM gender WHERE gender = 'Female')) AS percentage
FROM superhero
JOIN colour ON superhero.skin_colour_id = colour.id
WHERE colour.colour = 'Blue' AND superhero.gender_id IN (SELECT id FROM gender WHERE gender = 'Female');

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.colour) AS percentage
FROM 
    colour AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    superhero AS T2 ON T2.skin_colour_id = T1.id
INNER JOIN 
    gender AS T3 ON T3.id = T2.gender_id
WHERE 
    T3.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.superhero_name)) * 100 AS percentage
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    colour AS T3 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T2.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' AND T2.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / 
         COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END)) * 100, 
    2) AS percentage
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    colour AS T2 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    gender AS T3 ON T1.gender_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T3.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN T3.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
        COUNT(T1.superhero_name) * 100, 
        2
    ) AS percentage
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id
INNER JOIN 
    colour AS T3 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T2.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T3.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(T1.id)) AS percentage_blue_female_superheroes
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    colour AS T3 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T2.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.superhero_name)) * 100 AS percentage_female_marvel
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.publisher_id)) * 100 AS percentage_female_marvel
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id
INNER JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    COUNT(T1.superhero_name) AS percentage_female_marvel
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id
INNER JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT ((SUM(CASE WHEN T2.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.superhero_name)) * 100) AS percentage_female_heroes_published_by_marvel FROM superhero AS T1 JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id JOIN publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id WHERE T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100) / COUNT(T1.superhero_name) AS percentage
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    gender AS T3 ON T1.gender_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T3.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.superhero_name) AS percentage_female_marvelHeroes
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    gender AS T3 ON T1.gender_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.superhero_name) AS percentage_female_marvel
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender_id = (SELECT id FROM gender WHERE gender = 'Female') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100) / 
    COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_marvel_heroes
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero s JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics')) AS percentage_female_marvel
FROM 
    superhero s
JOIN 
    publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN 
    gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE 
    s.gender_id = (SELECT id FROM gender WHERE gender = 'Female')
AND 
    p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.superhero_name)) * 100 AS percentage_female_marvel
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    gender AS T3 ON T1.gender_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

    SELECT ph.UserId
    FROM postHistory ph
    JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id
    WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
)

FROM comments c
JOIN EditedUsers eu ON c.UserId = eu.UserId;

SELECT p.Title, c.Text, AVG(p.ViewCount) AS AverageViewCount
FROM posts p
JOIN tags t ON p.Tags LIKE '%<humor>%'
JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
GROUP BY p.Title, c.Text;

SELECT AVG(p.ViewCount) AS AverageViewCount, p.Title, c.Text
FROM posts p
JOIN postTags pt ON p.Id = pt.PostId
JOIN tags t ON pt.TagId = t.Id
JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE t.TagName LIKE '<humor>'
GROUP BY p.Id;

SELECT AVG(p.ViewCount), p.Title, c.Text
FROM posts AS p
JOIN postTags AS pt ON p.Id = pt.PostId
JOIN tags AS t ON pt.TagId = t.Id
JOIN comments AS c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE t.TagName = '<humor>'
GROUP BY p.Id;

SELECT AVG(p.ViewCount), p.Title, c.Text
FROM posts p
JOIN postTags pt ON p.Id = pt.PostId
JOIN tags t ON pt.TagId = t.Id
LEFT JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE t.TagName = '<humor>'
GROUP BY p.ViewCount, p.Title, c.Text;

SELECT p.Title, c.Text, AVG(p.ViewCount) AS AverageViewCount
FROM posts p
JOIN tags t ON p.Id = t.ExcerptPostId
JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE t.TagName LIKE '%<humor>%'
GROUP BY p.Id;

SELECT AVG(posts.ViewCount), posts.Title, comments.Text
FROM posts
JOIN tags ON posts.Id = tags.PostId
JOIN comments ON posts.Id = comments.PostId
WHERE tags.TagName = '<humor>'
GROUP BY posts.Title, comments.Text;

SELECT p.Title, AVG(p.ViewCount) AS AvgViewCount, c.Text
FROM posts p
JOIN postTags pt ON p.Id = pt.PostId
JOIN tags t ON pt.TagId = t.Id
JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE t.TagName LIKE '%<humor>%'
GROUP BY p.Title;

SELECT p.Title, c.Text, AVG(p.ViewCount) AS AvgViewCount
FROM posts p
JOIN postTags pt ON p.Id = pt.PostId
JOIN tags t ON pt.TagId = t.Id
LEFT JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId AND c.CommentType = 1 -- Assuming 1 is the type for comments
WHERE t.TagName = '<humor>'
GROUP BY p.Title;

SELECT AVG(t1.ViewCount), t1.Title, t2.Text FROM posts AS t1 JOIN postTags AS t3 ON t1.Id = t3.PostId JOIN tags AS t2 ON t3.TagId = t2.Id JOIN comments AS t4 ON t1.Id = t4.PostId WHERE t2.TagName = '<humor>'

SELECT AVG(p.ViewCount), p.Title, c.Text
FROM posts p
JOIN tags t ON p.Tags LIKE '%' + t.TagName + '%'
JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE t.TagName = 'humor'
GROUP BY p.Title, c.Text

SELECT 
    p.Title,
    c.Text,
    AVG(p.ViewCount) AS AvgViewCount
FROM 
    posts p
JOIN 
    postTags pt ON p.Id = pt.PostId
JOIN 
    tags t ON pt.TagId = t.Id
LEFT JOIN 
    comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE 
    t.TagName LIKE '%<humor>%'
GROUP BY 
    p.Title, c.Text;

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(Id)) - 
     (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(Id))) * 100 AS PercentageDifference
FROM 
    badges
WHERE 
    Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) - 
     (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*))) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    badges
WHERE 
    Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(Name)) * 100 - 
     (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(Name)) * 100) AS PercentageDifference
FROM 
    badges
WHERE 
    Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*)) - 
     (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*))) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM badges
WHERE Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) - 
     (SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*))) * 100 AS PercentageDifference
FROM 
    badges
WHERE 
    Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) - 
     (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END))) * 100 AS PercentageDifference
FROM 
    (SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', Date) AS Year FROM badges WHERE Name = 'Student')

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) - 1) * 100 AS PercentageDifference;

SELECT 
  ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 - 
   (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM badges WHERE Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(b.Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(b.Name)) - 
     (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(b.Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(b.Name))) / 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(b.Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(b.Name)) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    badges b
WHERE 
    b.Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
  ((count_2010 / count_2011 - 1) * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS count_2010, 
    COUNT(*) AS count_2011 
  FROM badges 
  WHERE Name = 'Student' 
  AND STRFTIME('%Y', Date) IN ('2010', '2011')
) AS subquery;

SELECT 
    ABS(((SUM(CASE WHEN Year(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 - 
         (SUM(CASE WHEN Year(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100) / 
        ((SUM(CASE WHEN Year(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100)) * 100 AS PercentageDifference
FROM badges
WHERE Name = 'Student';

SELECT AVG(u.UpVotes) AS AvgUpVotes, AVG(u.Age) AS AvgAge
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
GROUP BY u.Id
HAVING COUNT(p.Id) > 10;

SELECT 
    AVG(u.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes,
    AVG(u.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM 
    users u
JOIN 
    posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE 
    u.Id IN (
        SELECT 
            OwnerUserId
        FROM 
            posts
        GROUP BY 
            OwnerUserId
        HAVING 
            COUNT(OwnerUserId) > 10
    )

SELECT 
    SUM(u.UpVotes) / COUNT(u.Id) AS AvgUpVotes,
    SUM(u.Age) / COUNT(u.Id) AS AvgAge
FROM 
    users u
JOIN 
    posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
GROUP BY 
    u.Id
HAVING 
    COUNT(p.Id) > 10;

SELECT AVG(T1.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes, AVG(T2.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM votes AS T1
JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id
JOIN users AS T3 ON T2.OwnerUserId = T3.Id
GROUP BY T3.Id
HAVING COUNT(T2.Id) > 10;

SELECT AVG(users.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes, AVG(users.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM users
JOIN posts ON users.Id = posts.OwnerUserId
JOIN postHistory ON users.Id = postHistory.OwnerId
WHERE users.Id IN (
  SELECT UserId
  FROM posts
  GROUP BY UserId
  HAVING COUNT(UserId) > 10
)

SELECT 
    AVG(v.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes,
    AVG(u.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM 
    users u
JOIN 
    posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
JOIN 
    votes v ON u.Id = v.OwnerUserId
WHERE 
    p.OwnerUserId IN (
        SELECT 
            OwnerUserId
        FROM 
            posts
        GROUP BY 
            OwnerUserId
        HAVING 
            COUNT(*) > 10
    )

FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY u.Id ORDER BY p.Id) > 10;

    GROUP BY OwnerUserId
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 10

WITH StorySpotlightCards AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalStorySpotlightCards
    FROM cards
    WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1
),
FrenchStorySpotlightCards AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS FrenchStorySpotlightCards
    FROM cards
    JOIN foreign_data ON cards.uuid = foreign_data.uuid
    WHERE cards.isStorySpotlight = 1 AND foreign_data.language = 'French'
)
SELECT 
    (CAST(FrenchStorySpotlightCards.FrenchStorySpotlightCards AS REAL) / StorySpotlightCards.TotalStorySpotlightCards) * 100 AS Percentage
FROM 
    StorySpotlightCards, FrenchStorySpotlightCards;

    SELECT 1
    FROM set_translations st_j
    JOIN sets s_j ON st_j.setCode = s_j.code
    WHERE st_j.setCode = st.setCode
    AND st_j.language LIKE '%Japanese%'
)
