SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN t2.element = 'O' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM bond AS t1
JOIN atom AS t2 ON t1.bond_id = t2.bond_id
WHERE t1.bond_type = '-';

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'O' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T2.bond_type = '-';

SELECT AVG(COUNT(CASE WHEN t1.element = 'O' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END)) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM atom AS t1
JOIN bond AS t2 ON t1.molecule_id = t2.molecule_id
WHERE t2.bond_type = '-';

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN t3.element = 'o' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM molecule AS t1
JOIN bond AS t2 ON t1.molecule_id = t2.molecule_id
JOIN atom AS t3 ON t1.molecule_id = t3.molecule_id
WHERE t2.bond_type = '-';

SELECT AVG(COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'o' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END)) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM molecule AS m
JOIN bond AS b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN atom AS a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = '-';

SELECT AVG(COUNT(*)) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM bond
JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
JOIN connected ON bond.bond_id = connected.bond_id
JOIN atom ON connected.atom_id = atom.atom_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = '-'
AND atom.element = 'O';

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'O' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
JOIN molecule AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id
WHERE T2.bond_type = '-';

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS average_oxygen_atoms
FROM (
    SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN t1.element = 'O' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS oxygen_count
    FROM atom AS t1
    JOIN bond AS t2 ON t1.molecule_id = t2.molecule_id
    WHERE t2.bond_type = '-'
    GROUP BY t1.molecule_id
) AS subquery;

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.element = 'o' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
JOIN bond AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id
WHERE T3.bond_type = '-';

SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.label) AS avg_oxygen_per_molecule
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
JOIN connected AS T3 ON T2.atom_id = T3.atom_id
JOIN bond AS T4 ON T3.bond_id = T4.bond_id
WHERE T2.element = 'O' AND T4.bond_type = '-';

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_per_molecule
FROM (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS oxygen_count
  FROM atom a
  JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
  JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
  JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
  WHERE a.element = 'O' AND b.bond_type = '-'
) subquery;

```sql
SELECT 
  CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atom 
                                 JOIN connected ON atom.atom_id = connected.atom_id
                                 JOIN bond ON connected.bond_id = bond.bond_id
                                 JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
                                 WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM bond WHERE bond_type = '=')) AS percentage
FROM atom
JOIN connected ON atom.atom_id = connected.atom_id
JOIN bond ON connected.bond_id = bond.bond_id
JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM bond WHERE bond_type = '=') AND element = 'C';
```

    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.element != 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.element) AS percentage_non_fluorine
FROM 
    atom AS T1
JOIN 
    molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE 
    T2.label = '+';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.element != 'F' THEN T2.atom_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T2.atom_id) AS percentage_non_fluorine
FROM 
    atom AS T1
JOIN 
    connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id
JOIN 
    molecule AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id
WHERE 
    T3.label = '+'

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM atom AS a JOIN connected AS c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
        WHERE a.element = 'F' AND c.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    ) THEN m.molecule_id END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)
FROM 
    molecule AS m
WHERE 
    m.label = '+'

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) * 100 / (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM molecule
        WHERE label = '+'
    ) AS percentage_non_fluorine_carcinogens
FROM 
    atom
JOIN 
    molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE 
    atom.element != 'F' AND
    molecule.label = '+';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT T3.atom_id) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.element = 'F' THEN T3.atom_id ELSE NULL END)) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT T3.atom_id) AS percentage_no_fluorine
FROM 
    molecule AS T1
JOIN 
    atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
JOIN 
    connected AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id
WHERE 
    T1.label = '+'

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.element = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.atom_id) AS percentage
FROM 
    molecule AS T1
JOIN 
    atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE 
    T1.label = '+';

    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM

GROUP BY

SELECT 
    t1.bond_type,

    t2.is_carcinogenic
FROM 
    bond AS t1
JOIN 
    molecule AS t2 ON t1.molecule_id = t2.molecule_id
WHERE 
    t1.molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY

FROM bond
JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY bond_type

LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    bond_type,
    COUNT(*) AS bond_count,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bond WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010') / 2 THEN 'Majority' ELSE 'Not Majority' END AS bond_type_status,
    properties.carcinogenic
FROM 
    bond
JOIN 
    molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN 
    properties ON molecule.molecule_id = properties.molecule_id
WHERE 
    molecule.label = 'TR010'
GROUP BY 
    bond_type;

    bond_type,
    CASE 
        WHEN label LIKE '%carcinogen%' THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM

JOIN 
    bond AS b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE 
    m.molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY 
    bond_type
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    b.bond_type,
    c.carcinogenic
FROM 
    bond AS b
JOIN 
    connected AS c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
WHERE 
    b.molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY 
    b.bond_type
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT bond_type, MAX(carcinogenic)
FROM (
    SELECT T1.bond_type, T2.carcinogenic,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(T1.bond_type) DESC) AS rn
    FROM bond AS T1
    JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
    WHERE T2.label = 'TR010'
    GROUP BY T1.bond_type, T2.carcinogenic
) AS subquery
WHERE rn = 1;

FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = ' = '
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY num_double_bonds DESC
LIMIT 1;

FROM molecule m

ORDER BY num_double_bonds DESC
LIMIT 1;

ORDER BY COUNT(b.bond_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

HAVING m.label = '+'

AND T2.label = '+'

SELECT MAX("Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") AS HighestEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE ("NumGE1500"::numeric / "NumTstTakr") > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(f."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.NumGE1500 / s.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(T1.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)`) AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
WHERE T2.NumGE1500 / T2.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX("Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE ("NumGE1500" / "NumTstTakr") > 0.3;

SELECT MAX("Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") AS HighestEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE CAST(satscores.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / satscores.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") AS HighestEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE CAST(s.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / s.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX("Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE CAST(satscores.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / satscores.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(DISTINCT "Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS HighestEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE CAST(satscores.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / satscores.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX("Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE satscores.NumGE1500 / satscores.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(f.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE (f.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > 0.3 AND (s.AvgScrRead + s.AvgScrMath + s.AvgScrWrite) >= 900;

SELECT MAX(COALESCE(T1.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`, 0)) AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm AS T1
INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
WHERE T2.NumGE1500 / T2.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT DISTINCT s.FundingType
FROM schools AS s
JOIN satscores AS ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE s.County = 'Riverside'
GROUP BY s.CDSCode, s.FundingType
HAVING AVG(ss.AvgScrMath) > 400;

SELECT s.School, s.FundingType
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE s.County = 'Riverside'
GROUP BY s.CDSCode
HAVING AVG(ss.AvgScrMath) > 400;

SELECT DISTINCT s.School, s.FundingType
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE s.County = 'Riverside'
GROUP BY s.School, s.FundingType
HAVING AVG(ss.AvgScrMath) > 400;

SELECT DISTINCT s.FundingType
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE s.County = 'Riverside'
GROUP BY s.School
HAVING AVG(ss.AvgScrMath) > 400;

SELECT s.School, s.FundingType

JOIN satscores AS ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE s.County = 'Riverside'

SELECT DISTINCT s.FundingType FROM schools AS s JOIN satscores AS ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE s.District = 'Riverside' AND ss.AvgScrMath > 400
SELECT DISTINCT sch.FundingType FROM schools AS sch JOIN satscores AS sat ON sch.CDSCode = sat.cds WHERE sch.City = 'Riverside' AND sat.AvgScrMath > 400;

SELECT T1.School, T1.FundingType FROM schools AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T1.County = 'Riverside' AND T2.AvgScrMath > 400

SELECT DISTINCT s.School, s.FundingType

SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" 
FROM frpm 
ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC 
LIMIT 1, 1;
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" FROM frpm WHERE "Educational Option Type" = '10th and 11th' AND "Grade Range" = '1-12' ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    (Free_Meal_Count_K_12 / Enrollment_K_12) AS Eligible_Free_Rate
FROM 
    frpm
WHERE 
    Low_Grade = 'K' AND High_Grade = '12'
ORDER BY 
    Enrollment_K_12 DESC
LIMIT 10, 2;

SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" AS EligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
WHERE "Educational Option Type" = 'K-12'
ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 2 OFFSET 9;

SELECT 
    CDSCode, 
    "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" AS EligibleFreeRate
FROM 
    frpm
WHERE 
    "Low Grade" <= '12' AND "High Grade" >= '1'
ORDER BY 
    "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT "CDSCode", "School Name", ("Free Meal Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)") AS "Eligible Free Rate"
FROM frpm
WHERE "Low Grade" = '1' AND "High Grade" = '12'
ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 10, 2;

SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" 
FROM frpm 
WHERE "Educational Option Type" LIKE '%grades 1-12%' 
ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC 
LIMIT 2 OFFSET 9;

SELECT TOP 2 WITH TIES f.[Free Meal Count (K-12)] / f.[Enrollment (K-12)] AS EligibleFreeRate, f.CDSCode
FROM frpm f
INNER JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
ORDER BY f.[Enrollment (K-12)] DESC OFFSET 9 ROWS FETCH NEXT 2 ROWS ONLY
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" FROM frpm WHERE "Low Grade" = '1' AND "High Grade" = '12' ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC LIMIT 10, 2

SELECT 
    CDSCode,
    "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" AS EligibleFreeRate
FROM 
    frpm
WHERE 
    "Low Grade" BETWEEN 1 AND 12 AND 
    "High Grade" BETWEEN 1 AND 12
ORDER BY 
    "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 10, 2;

SELECT 
    T2.School AS School_Name,
    T2.County_Code,
    T2.District_Code,
    (T1.`Free Meal Count (K-12)` / T1.`Enrollment (K-12)`) * 100 AS Eligible_Free_Rate
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T1.`Educational Option Type` = '10th and 11th'
ORDER BY 
    T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` DESC
LIMIT 2 OFFSET 9;

SELECT AVG(frpm.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)]) AS AvgWritingScore, schools.School, schools.Phone
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE (schools.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR schools.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01')
GROUP BY schools.School, schools.Phone;

SELECT AVG(frpm.AvgScrWrite), schools.School, schools.Phone
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE (schools.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR schools.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01')
GROUP BY schools.School, schools.Phone;

SELECT s.School, AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgWritingScore, s.Phone
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE (s.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01')
GROUP BY s.School, s.Phone;

SELECT

SELECT DISTINCT AVG(frpm.AvgScrWrite), schools.School, schools.Phone

SELECT 
    f.School Name, 
    f.County Name, 
    f.District Name, 
    f.School Type, 
    f.Educational Option Type, 
    f.FRPM Count (K-12), 
    f.Enrollment (K-12), 
    (f.FRPM Count (K-12) / f.Enrollment (K-12)) AS Eligible_Free_Reduced_Price_Meal_Rate
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    f.Ownership Code = '66'
ORDER BY 
    Eligible_Free_Reduced_Price_Meal_Rate DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT 
    "CDSCode", 
    "School Name", 
    ("FRPM Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)") AS "Eligible Free or Reduced Price Meal Rate"
FROM 
    frpm
WHERE 
    "Ownership Code" = '66'
ORDER BY 
    "FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT 
    s.School AS SchoolName,
    f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] / f.[Enrollment (K-12)] AS EligibleFreeOrReducedPriceMealRate
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    f.[Ownership Code] = 66
ORDER BY 
    f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT TOP 5 
    frpm.School,
    frpm.County,
    frpm.District,
    frpm.School_Name,
    frpm.FRPM_Count_K_12 AS FRPM_Count,
    frpm.Enrollment_K_12 AS Enrollment,
    (frpm.FRPM_Count_K_12 / frpm.Enrollment_K_12) * 100 AS Eligible_Free_Reduced_Price_Meal_Rate
FROM 
    frpm
JOIN 
    schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE 
    frpm.Ownership_Code = 66
ORDER BY 
    Eligible_Free_Reduced_Price_Meal_Rate DESC;

SELECT

JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.OwnerCode = 66
ORDER BY 
    f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT TOP 5 f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] / f.[Enrollment (K-12)] AS EligibilityRate, s.School
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.OwnershipCode = 66
ORDER BY f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] DESC;

SELECT

WHERE 
    schools.StatusType = 'Ownership Code' AND schools.OwnershipCode = 66
ORDER BY

LIMIT 5;

SELECT

    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode

ORDER BY

LIMIT 5;

SELECT

LIMIT 5;

SELECT

SELECT 
    s.School, 
    s.DOCType 
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE 
    (f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") 
        FROM 
            frpm f
        WHERE 
            f."Charter School" = 0
    )

SELECT 
    s.School,
    s.DOCType

    schools s

    frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE 
    (f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)")
        FROM 
            frpm f
    )

SELECT

    s.DOCType AS DOCType

    frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE 
    ABS(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(ABS(f2.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`))
        FROM 
            frpm f2
    )

SELECT T2.School, T2.DOCType
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE (T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
    SELECT AVG(T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`)
    FROM frpm AS T1
    JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
    WHERE T2.FundingType = 'Local'
)
AND T2.FundingType = 'Local';

SELECT s.School, s.DOC, s.DOCType
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.FundingType = 'Local'
AND ABS(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
    SELECT AVG(ABS(f2.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`))
    FROM frpm f2
    JOIN schools s2 ON f2.CDSCode = s2.CDSCode
    WHERE s2.FundingType = 'Local'
)

SELECT s.School, s.DOCType, (f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS EnrollmentDifference
FROM frpm f
INNER JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE f.FundingType = 'Locally Funded'
AND (f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") > (
    SELECT AVG(f2."Enrollment (K-12)" - f2."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)")
    FROM frpm f2
    INNER JOIN schools s2 ON f2.CDSCode = s2.CDSCode
    WHERE f2.FundingType = 'Locally Funded'
)

    T2.school AS School_Name,

    T1.enrollment_k12 - T1.enrollment_ages5to17 AS Difference

    frpm AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T1.enrollment_k12 - T1.enrollment_ages5to17 > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(enrollment_k12 - enrollment_ages5to17)
        FROM 
            frpm AS T1
        JOIN 
            schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
        WHERE 
            T2.fundingtype = 'Local'
    )
AND 
    T2.fundingtype = 'Local';

SELECT s.School, s.DOCType

AND ABS(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
    SELECT AVG(ABS(f2.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`))
    FROM schools s2

    FROM frpm AS T1

SELECT s.School, SUM(f.[Enrollment (K-12)]) AS TotalEnrollment
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.DOC = 31
GROUP BY s.School
ORDER BY TotalEnrollment DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.State, SUM(T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` + T1.`Free Meal Count (K-12)` + T1.`FRPM Count (K-12)`) AS TotalEnrollment
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T2.DOC = 31
GROUP BY T2.State
ORDER BY TotalEnrollment DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    s.School AS SchoolName,
    SUM(f.[Enrollment (K-12)]) AS TotalEnrollment
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.DOC = 31
GROUP BY 
    s.School
ORDER BY 
    TotalEnrollment DESC;

SELECT s.School, f.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)] * f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] AS TotalEligibleForFRPM
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.DOC = '31'
ORDER BY f.[Enrollment (K-12)] DESC
LIMIT 1

JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.DOC = 31 AND T2.`Low Grade` <= '12' AND T2.`High Grade` >= '1'

ORDER BY TotalEnrollment DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    s.School AS SchoolName,
    AVG(s.AvgScrRead) OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY AVG(s.AvgScrRead) DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS RankInCounty
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE 
    s.Virtual = 'F'

SELECT 
    s.School,
    s.County,
    s.Virtual,
    ss.AvgScrRead,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC) AS Rank
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE 
    s.Virtual = 'F'
ORDER BY 
    s.County, 
    Rank;

SELECT 
    s.School,
    f.County,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.County ORDER BY f.AvgScrRead DESC) AS Rank
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.Virtual = 'F'
ORDER BY 
    f.County,
    Rank;

SELECT 
    T2.School,
    T2.County,
    T2.District,
    AVG(T1.AvgScrRead) AS AvgReadingScore,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY T2.County ORDER BY AVG(T1.AvgScrRead) DESC) AS Rank
FROM 
    satscores AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T2.Virtual = 'F'
GROUP BY 
    T2.School, T2.County, T2.District
HAVING 
    Rank <= 5;

SELECT T1.School

JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds

    SELECT T1.County
    FROM schools AS T1
    JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
    WHERE T1.Virtual = 'F'
    GROUP BY T1.County
)
ORDER BY T1.County,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY T1.County ORDER BY T2.AvgScrRead DESC) <= 5;

SELECT T1.School, T1.County, T2.AvgScrRead

AND T2.sname IS NOT NULL
AND T2.dname IS NOT NULL
AND T2.cname IS NOT NULL
AND T2.enroll12 IS NOT NULL
AND T2.NumTstTakr IS NOT NULL
AND T2.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL
AND T2.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL
AND T2.AvgScrWrite IS NOT NULL
AND T2.NumGE1500 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY T1.County, T2.AvgScrRead DESC;

SELECT 
    T1.School,
    T1.County,
    T1.District,
    T1.NCESSchool,
    T1.Virtual,
    T1.FundingType,
    T1.Doc,
    T1.DocType,
    T1.Soc,
    T1.SocType,
    T1.Edopscode,
    T1.Edopsname,
    T1.Eilcode,
    T1.Eilname,

    T1.Virtual,

    SELECT CDSCode, AvgScrRead,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY T1.County ORDER BY T2.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rank

SELECT s.School, s.County, s.District, s.Street, s.City, s.Zip, s.State, s.MailStreet, s.MailCity, s.MailZip, s.MailState, s.Phone, s.Ext, s.Website, s.OpenDate, s.ClosedDate, s.Charter, s.CharterNum, s.FundingType, s.DOC, s.DocType, s.SOC, s.SOCType, s.EdOpsCode, s.EdOpsName, s.EILCode, s.EILName, s.GSoffered, s.GSserved, s.Virtual, s.Magnet, s.Latitude, s.Longitude, s.AdmFName1, s.AdmLName1, s.AdmEmail1, s.AdmFName2, s.AdmLName2, s.AdmEmail2, s.AdmFName3, s.AdmLName3, s.AdmEmail3, s.LastUpdate, ss.AvgScrRead, ss.AvgScrMath, ss.AvgScrWrite, ss.NumGE1500
FROM schools s

WITH RankedSchools AS (
    SELECT
        s.School,
        s.County,
        ss.AvgScrRead,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rn
    FROM
        schools s
    JOIN
        satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
    WHERE
        s.Virtual = 'F'
)
SELECT
    School,
    County,
    AvgScrRead
FROM
    RankedSchools
WHERE
    rn <= 5;

SELECT

    s.EilCode AS EilCode,
    s.EilName AS EilName,
    s.Gsoffered AS Gsoffered,

SELECT DISTINCT "Low Grade", "High Grade" FROM frpm WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT CDSCode FROM schools ORDER BY ABS(Longitude) DESC LIMIT 1);

SELECT f.Grade_Span_Offered
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE ABS(s.Longitude) = (SELECT MAX(ABS(Longitude)) FROM schools);

SELECT f."Low Grade", f."High Grade"
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE ABS(s.Longitude) = (SELECT MAX(ABS(Longitude)) FROM schools);
77:
SELECT 
    s.School AS School_Name,
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)] AS Percent_Eligible_FRPM
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    f.[Low Grade] = 'K' AND f.[High Grade] = '9'
    AND s.County = 'Los Angeles'

SELECT 
    s.School AS SchoolName,
    (f.[FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)] / f.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)]) * 100 AS PercentEligibleFRPM
FROM 
    frpm f
INNER JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.County = 'Los Angeles'
    AND f.LowGrade = 'K'
    AND f.HighGrade <= '9';

SELECT 
    T2.School, 
    (T1.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` / T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` * 100) AS percent_eligible_frpm
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T2.County = 'Los Angeles' 
    AND T1.LowGrade = 'K' 
    AND T1.HighGrade <= '9'

SELECT 
    s.School AS School_Name,
    (f.[FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)] / f.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)]) * 100 AS Percent_Eligible_FRPM
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.County = 'Los Angeles'
    AND ('Kindergarten' IN s.GSoffered OR '9' IN s.HighGrade)
GROUP BY 
    s.School;

SELECT 
    s.School,
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)]
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)] IS NOT NULL
    AND s.County = 'Los Angeles'
    AND ',' + s.GSserved + ',' LIKE '%,Kindergarten,%'
    AND ',' + s.GSserved + ',' LIKE '%,9,%'

SELECT 
    s.School,
    (f.[FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)] / f.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)]) * 100 AS [Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)]
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.County = 'Los Angeles'
    AND f.LowGrade = 'K'
    AND f.HighGrade = '9'
GROUP BY 
    s.School;

SELECT 
    T2.School AS SchoolName,
    (T1.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` / T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` * 100) AS PercentageEligibleFRPM
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T1.`Low Grade` = 'K'
    AND T1.`High Grade` = '9'
    AND T2.County = 'Los Angeles';

SELECT 
    s.School,
    (f.[FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)] / f.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)]) * 100 AS [Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)]
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.County = 'Los Angeles'
    AND (s.GSoffered LIKE '%K%' OR s.GSoffered LIKE '%9%')

SELECT DISTINCT T2.School, T1.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)], (T1.[FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)] / T1.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)]) * 100 AS [Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)]
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.[Low Grade] = 'KG' AND T1.[High Grade] = '9' AND T2.County = 'Los Angeles'

SELECT 
    s.School AS SchoolName,
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)] AS FRPMPctEligible,
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)] AS FRPMPctEligibleFRPM
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.County = 'Los Angeles'
    AND s.GSoffered LIKE '%Kindergarten%'
    AND s.GSserved LIKE '%9th%'

SELECT T2.School, T1.County Name, CONCAT(T1.Low Grade, ' - ', T1.High Grade) AS "Grade Span", 
       ROUND((T1."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" / T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") * 100, 2) AS "Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)"
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.County Name = 'Los Angeles' AND T1.Low Grade = 'K' AND T1.High Grade = '9'

79:
SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS NumberOfSchools
FROM schools
WHERE Virtual = 'F'
AND (County = 'San Diego' OR County = 'Santa Barbara')
GROUP BY County
ORDER BY NumberOfSchools DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(s.CDSCode) AS NumberOfSchools, s.County
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.Virtual = 'F' AND s.County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara')
GROUP BY s.County
ORDER BY NumberOfSchools DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    COUNT(s.CDSCode) AS NumberOfSchools,
    s.County
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara') 
    AND s.Virtual = 'F'
GROUP BY 
    s.County
ORDER BY 
    NumberOfSchools DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS NumberOfSchools, County
FROM schools
WHERE Virtual = 'F'
AND County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara', 'Other Counties Between Them')
GROUP BY County
ORDER BY NumberOfSchools DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*), County
FROM schools
WHERE County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara') AND Virtual = 'F'
GROUP BY County
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT f.County, COUNT(s.CDSCode) AS NumberOfSchools
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.Virtual = 'F'
AND f.County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara')
GROUP BY f.County
ORDER BY NumberOfSchools DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS NumberOfSchools
FROM schools
WHERE County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara') AND Virtual = 'F'
GROUP BY County
ORDER BY NumberOfSchools DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.County, COUNT(T1.School) AS NumberOfSchools
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.Virtual = 'F'
AND T2.County BETWEEN 'San Diego' AND 'Santa Barbara'
GROUP BY T2.County
ORDER BY NumberOfSchools DESC;

SELECT T1.County, COUNT(T1.School) AS NumberOfSchools
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.Virtual = 'F'
AND T1.County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara')
GROUP BY T1.County
ORDER BY NumberOfSchools DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*), T2.CountyName
FROM schools AS T1
INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.Virtual = 'F'
GROUP BY T2.CountyName
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(s.CDSCode), f.`County Name`
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.Virtual = 'F' AND (f.`County Name` = 'San Diego' OR f.`County Name` = 'Santa Barbara')
GROUP BY f.`County Name`
ORDER BY COUNT(s.CDSCode) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.City), T2.City, COUNT(T1.School)
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'
AND T2.Magnet = 1
AND T2.GSoffered LIKE '%K%' AND T2.GSoffered LIKE '%8%'
GROUP BY T2.City

SELECT COUNT(s.CDSCode), s.MailCity
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.Magnet = 1 AND s.GSserved = 'K-8' AND f.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'
GROUP BY s.MailCity;

SELECT 
    s.City, 
    COUNT(s.School) AS NumberOfSchools
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.Magnet = 1 
    AND s.GSoffered LIKE '%K%' 
    AND s.GSoffered LIKE '%8%'
    AND f.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'
GROUP BY 
    s.City;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT City) AS NumberOfCities, COUNT(*) AS TotalNumberOfSchools
FROM schools
WHERE Magnet = 1 AND GSoffered LIKE '%K%' AND GSoffered LIKE '%8%'
AND NSLP_Provision_Status = 'Multiple Provision Types';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.City) AS num_cities, COUNT(T1.School) AS num_schools
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND T1.GSoffered LIKE '%K-8%' AND T2.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.City) AS NumberOfCities, COUNT(T1.School) AS TotalNumberOfSchools
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND T2.LowGrade = 'K' AND T2.HighGrade = '8' AND T2.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'
GROUP BY T1.City;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.MailCity) AS NumberOfCities, COUNT(T2.School) AS NumberOfSchools
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T2.Magnet = 1 AND T2.GSoffered = 'K-8' AND T1.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.City) AS NumberOfCities, COUNT(T1.School) AS TotalSchools
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND T1.GSoffered LIKE '%K-8%' AND T2.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'

SELECT COUNT(*), MailCity
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.Magnet = 1
AND frpm.GSoffered LIKE '%K%'
AND frpm.GSoffered LIKE '%8%'
AND frpm.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'
GROUP BY MailCity;

SELECT COUNT(s.CDSCode), s.City
FROM schools AS s
JOIN frpm AS f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.Magnet = 1 AND s.GSserved LIKE '%K%' AND s.GSserved LIKE '%8%' AND f.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'
GROUP BY s.City;

SELECT COUNT(T1.City) AS NumberOfCities, T1.City, COUNT(T1.School) AS NumberOfSchools
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND T1.GSoffered LIKE '%K%' AND T1.GSoffered LIKE '%8%' AND T2.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'
GROUP BY T1.City;

SELECT COUNT(client_id) AS num_female_customers
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01'
AND d.A2 = 'Sokolov';

JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01'
AND d.A2 = 'Sokolow';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id)
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE c.issued > t.date AND d.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
AND a.district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A3 LIKE '%East Bohemia%'
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.account_id)
FROM account AS T1
JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE T2.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
AND T3.A3 LIKE '%Východní Böhemsko%'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id)
FROM account a
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id

-- Step 1: Find the earliest birth_date
WITH YoungestClients AS (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS min_birth_date FROM client
),

-- Step 2: Calculate the average salary for each client
ClientSalary AS (
    SELECT 
        client_id,
        AVG(A11) AS avg_salary
    FROM 
        client
    JOIN 
        disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
    GROUP BY 
        client_id
)

-- Step 3: Filter clients with the highest average salary
SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    c.account_id
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE 
    c.birth_date = (SELECT min_birth_date FROM YoungestClients)
    AND c.client_id IN (SELECT client_id FROM ClientSalary WHERE avg_salary = (SELECT MAX(avg_salary) FROM ClientSalary));

SELECT T3.account_id
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id

LIMIT 1;

SELECT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.district_id IN (
    SELECT d2.district_id
    FROM client c2
    JOIN disp d2 ON c2.client_id = d2.client_id
    WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(NOW(), c2.birth_date)) = (
        SELECT MIN(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(NOW(), c3.birth_date)))
        FROM client c3
        JOIN disp d3 ON c3.client_id = d3.client_id
        WHERE c3.district_id = c2.district_id
    )
)
AND c.district_id IN (
    SELECT d4.district_id
    FROM client c4
    JOIN disp d4 ON c4.client_id = d4.client_id
    GROUP BY d4.district_id
    HAVING AVG(d4.A11) = (
        SELECT MAX(AVG(d5.A11))
        FROM client c5
        JOIN disp d5 ON c5.client_id = d5.client_id
        GROUP BY d5.district_id
    )
);

SELECT MIN(A11) AS min_salary, MAX(A11) AS max_salary, max_salary - min_salary AS gap
FROM district d
JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
AND c.birth_date IN (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date)
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
);

SELECT 
    T2.account_id,
    MAX(AVG(T1.A11)) - MIN(AVG(T1.A11)) AS salary_gap
FROM 
    district AS T1
JOIN 
    client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
WHERE 
    T2.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY 
    T2.account_id
ORDER BY 
    T2.birth_date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(A11) - MIN(A11) AS salary_gap
FROM (
    SELECT d.A11
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY c.client_id
) AS avg_salaries

SELECT DISTINCT T1.account_id, T2.A11 AS avg_salary
FROM disp AS T1
JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE T2.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY T2.birth_date ASC, T3.A11 ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(T3.A11) - MIN(T3.A11) AS salary_gap
FROM disp AS T1
JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE T2.gender = 'F';

SELECT MIN(d.A11) AS lowest_average_salary
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F';

SELECT T1.client_id, AVG(T3.A11) AS avg_salary
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T1.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY T1.client_id
ORDER BY T1.birth_date ASC, avg_salary ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(AVG(T3.A11)) - MIN(AVG(T3.A11)) AS gap
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id;

SELECT 
    t1.client_id,
    t1.gender,
    t1.birth_date,
    AVG(t2.amount) AS avg_salary
FROM 
    client t1
JOIN 
    trans t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id
WHERE 
    t1.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY 
    t1.client_id, t1.gender, t1.birth_date
ORDER BY 
    t1.birth_date ASC, avg_salary ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH AvgSalary AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM 
        client c
    JOIN 
        trans t ON c.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE 
        c.gender = 'F'
),
MaxAvgSalary AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg_salary
    FROM 
        AvgSalary
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT max_avg_salary FROM MaxAvgSalary) - 
    (SELECT MIN(AVG(amount)) FROM client c JOIN trans t ON c.account_id = t.account_id WHERE c.gender = 'F') AS gap;

WITH FemaleClients AS (
    SELECT 
        c.client_id,
        d.A11,
        c.birth_date
    FROM 
        client c
    JOIN 
        district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE 
        c.gender = 'F'
),
OldestFemaleClient AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(A11) AS avg_salary_oldest
    FROM 
        FemaleClients
    ORDER BY 
        birth_date ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
HighestAverageSalary AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(A11) AS max_avg_salary
    FROM 
        FemaleClients
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT max_avg_salary FROM HighestAverageSalary) - (SELECT avg_salary_oldest FROM OldestFemaleClient) AS gap;

SELECT 
    T1.account_id, 
    AVG(T2.amount) AS A11
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    trans AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.account_id
WHERE 
    T1.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY 
    T1.account_id
ORDER BY 
    AVG(T2.amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

-- Calculate the highest and lowest average salaries
SELECT 
    MAX(AVG(T2.amount)) AS max_avg_salary,
    MIN(AVG(T2.amount)) AS min_avg_salary
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    trans AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.account_id
WHERE 
    T1.gender = 'F';

-- Compute the gap
SELECT 
    (SELECT MAX(AVG(T2.amount)) FROM client AS T1 JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F') -
    (SELECT MIN(AVG(T2.amount)) FROM client AS T1 JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F') AS gap;

WITH AvgSalaries AS (
  SELECT c.client_id, AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
  FROM client c
  JOIN trans t ON c.client_id = t.account_id
  WHERE t.type IN ('ZAP', 'POU')
  GROUP BY c.client_id
)
SELECT MAX(avg_salary) - MIN(avg_salary) AS salary_gap
FROM AvgSalaries;

WITH avg_salaries AS (
    SELECT AVG(l.amount) AS avg_salary, c.client_id
    FROM loan l
    JOIN client c ON l.account_id = c.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY c.client_id
),
oldest_female_client AS (
    SELECT MIN(c.birth_date), c.client_id
    FROM client c
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
oldest_female_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT AVG(l.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM loan l
    JOIN client c ON l.account_id = c.account_id
    WHERE c.client_id = (SELECT client_id FROM oldest_female_client)
),
highest_lowest_avg_salaries AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_salary), MIN(avg_salary)
    FROM avg_salaries
)
SELECT (SELECT max_avg FROM highest_lowest_avg_salaries) - (SELECT min_avg FROM highest_lowest_avg_salaries) AS gap
FROM avg_salaries, oldest_female_avg_salary, highest_lowest_avg_salaries

116:
SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    d.disp_id,
    l.loan_id,
    t.transaction_id,
    t.date,
    t.amount,
    t.balance
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
JOIN 
    trans t ON l.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE 
    l.date = '1993-07-05'
    AND t.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27';

SELECT 
    ((t1.balance - t2.balance) / t2.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    trans AS t1
JOIN 
    trans AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id AND t1.date = '1993-03-22' AND t2.date = '1998-12-27'
WHERE 
    t1.account_id IN (
        SELECT 
            d.account_id
        FROM 
            client AS c
        JOIN 
            disp AS d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
        JOIN 
            loan AS l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
        WHERE 
            l.date = '1993-07-05'
    )

SELECT 
    ((t2.balance - t3.balance) / t3.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    trans t2 ON a.account_id = t2.account_id AND t2.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1993-07-05'
JOIN 
    trans t3 ON a.account_id = t3.account_id AND t3.date BETWEEN '1998-12-27' AND '1998-12-27'
WHERE 
    l.date = '1993-07-05';

SELECT 
    ((t2.balance - t3.balance) / t3.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    trans t2 ON a.account_id = t2.account_id AND t2.date = '1998-12-27'
JOIN 
    trans t3 ON a.account_id = t3.account_id AND t3.date = '1993-03-22'
WHERE 
    l.date = '1993-07-05';

SELECT 
    ((t1.balance_at_1993_03_22 - t1.balance_at_1998_12_27) / t1.balance_at_1998_12_27) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM (
    SELECT 
        t2.balance AS balance_at_1993_03_22,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t2.date = '1998-12-27' THEN t2.balance END) AS balance_at_1998_12_27
    FROM 
        trans t2
    JOIN 
        account t3 ON t2.account_id = t3.account_id
    WHERE 
        t2.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27'
) t1;

SELECT 
    ((T4.balance - T5.balance) / T5.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    account AS T1
JOIN 
    loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN 
    disp AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id AND T1.district_id = T3.district_id
JOIN 
    trans AS T4 ON T1.account_id = T4.account_id AND T4.date = '1993-03-22'
JOIN 
    trans AS T5 ON T1.account_id = T5.account_id AND T5.date = '1998-12-27'
WHERE 
    T2.status = 'approved' AND T2.date = '1993-07-05';

SELECT 
    ((t2.balance - t3.balance) / t3.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    trans t2 ON a.account_id = t2.account_id AND t2.date = '1993-03-22'
JOIN 
    trans t3 ON a.account_id = t3.account_id AND t3.date = '1998-12-27'
WHERE 
    l.`date` = '1993-07-05' AND l.status = 'approved';

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN T1.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27' THEN T1.balance ELSE NULL END) - MIN(CASE WHEN T1.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27' THEN T1.balance ELSE NULL END)) / MIN(CASE WHEN T1.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27' THEN T1.balance ELSE NULL END)) * 100 AS balance_increase_rate
FROM 
    trans AS T1
JOIN 
    account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
WHERE 
    T2.account_id IN (
        SELECT 
            account_id 
        FROM 
            loan 
        WHERE 
            date = '1993-07-05'
    );

SELECT 
    ((t1.balance - t2.balance) / t2.balance * 100) AS increase_rate
FROM 
    trans t1
JOIN 
    account acc ON t1.account_id = acc.account_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON acc.account_id = l.account_id
JOIN 
    disp d ON l.account_id = d.account_id
WHERE 
    l.date = '1993-07-05'
    AND t1.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27'
    AND t1.type IN ('I', 'U')

SELECT 
    ((t.balance - t2.balance) / t2.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    trans t
JOIN 
    trans t2 ON t.account_id = t2.account_id AND t.date <= '1993-03-22' AND t2.date >= '1998-12-27'
WHERE 
    t.account_id = (
        SELECT d.client_id
        FROM loan l
        JOIN disp d ON l.account_id = d.account_id
        WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05'
        ORDER BY l.date ASC
        LIMIT 1
    );

SELECT 
  ((balance_on_1993_03_22 - balance_on_1998_12_27) / balance_on_1998_12_27) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
  trans 
JOIN account ON trans.account_id = account.account_id 
WHERE client_id IN (
  SELECT client_id 
  FROM loan 
  JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id 
  WHERE date = '1993-07-05'
)
AND date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27'

AND t.type != 'POJISTENI'

JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE T1.type = 'VYDAJ'
AND T1.date LIKE '1996-01%'
GROUP BY T3.A2
ORDER BY total_withdrawal DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT d.A2 AS district_name, SUM(t.amount) AS total_withdrawals
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE t.type = 'VYDAJ' AND t.date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-01-31'
GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY total_withdrawals DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT d.A2, SUM(t.amount) AS total_withdrawal
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE t.type = 'VYDAJ' AND t.date LIKE '1996-01%'
GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY total_withdrawal DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT T1.A2, SUM(T3.amount) FROM district AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.type = 'VYDAJ' AND T3.date LIKE '1996-01%' GROUP BY T1.A2 ORDER BY SUM(T3.amount) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT 
    d.district_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS state,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increase_percentage
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN 
    district dis ON c.district_id = dis.district_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'

SELECT 
    d.district_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increase_percentage
FROM 
    district d
JOIN 
    account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN 
    disp disp ON a.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON disp.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'

SELECT 
    d.district_id,
    AVG(d.A13 / NULLIF(d.A12, 0)) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increase
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'
GROUP BY 
    d.district_id;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS district_state,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increase_percentage
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    disp disp ON a.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON disp.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN 
    district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D';

SELECT d.A2 AS district, d.A3 AS state, ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increase
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE l.status = 'D'
GROUP BY d.A2, d.A3;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district, 
    d.A3 AS state, 
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increase

    loan l

    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'

    d.A2,

SELECT 
    d.district_id,

SELECT

    d.district_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,

FROM

SELECT COUNT(client_id) AS num_male_clients
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN district ON disp.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE district.A15 = (
    SELECT DISTINCT A15
    FROM district
    ORDER BY A15 DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
)
AND client.gender = 'M';

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T3.A15 IS NOT NULL AND T3.A15 <> '' AND T1.gender = 'M' AND T2.date LIKE '%/%/95' ORDER BY CAST(T3.A15 AS INTEGER) DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1

SELECT COUNT(client_id) AS num_male_clients
FROM district d
JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE d.A15 IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM d.date) = 1995
ORDER BY d.A15 DESC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1;

SELECT COUNT(client_id)
FROM district AS T1
JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
WHERE T1.A15 = (
    SELECT DISTINCT A15
    FROM district
    ORDER BY A15 DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
);

SELECT COUNT(client.client_id)
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
WHERE account.district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM trans
    WHERE YEAR(date) = 1995
    GROUP BY district_id
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
)
AND client.gender = 'M'

SELECT COUNT(client.client_id)
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
WHERE disp.district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    ORDER BY A15 DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
)
AND client.gender = 'M';

SELECT COUNT(client_id)
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN district ON disp.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE district.A15 = (
    SELECT DISTINCT A15
    FROM district
    WHERE A15 IS NOT NULL AND A15 <> (
        SELECT MAX(A15)
        FROM district
        WHERE A15 IS NOT NULL
    )
);

SELECT COUNT(c.client_id)
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district dis ON a.district_id = dis.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M' AND YEAR(a.date) = 1995
ORDER BY dis.A15 DESC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1;

SELECT COUNT(c.client_id)
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN district dt ON d.district_id = dt.district_id
WHERE YEAR(t.date) = 1995 AND t.type = 'V'
GROUP BY dt.district_id
ORDER BY COUNT(dt.district_id) DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.client_id)
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T3.district_id = (
    SELECT T1.district_id
    FROM trans AS T1
    WHERE T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1995-12-31'
    GROUP BY T1.district_id
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
) AND T1.gender = 'M';

SELECT AVG(d.A15) AS avg_crimes_1995
FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
WHERE a.date >= '1997-01-01' AND d.A15 > 4000;
SELECT AVG(T2.A15) FROM account AS T1 JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.date >= '1997-01-01' AND T2.A15 > 4000

SELECT AVG(T3.amount) AS avg_crimes
FROM district AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T1.A15 > 4000 AND T2.date >= '1997-01-01' AND T3.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1995-12-31'

SELECT AVG(T1.A15) AS avg_crimes_1995
FROM district AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
WHERE T1.A15 > 4000 AND YEAR(T2.date) >= 1997;

SELECT AVG(d.A15) AS avg_crimes_1995
FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
WHERE a.date >= '1997-01-01'
GROUP BY d.district_id, d.A15
HAVING COUNT(a.account_id) > 4000;

SELECT T1.A3, AVG(T1.A15) AS avg_crimes
FROM district AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
GROUP BY T1.A3
HAVING SUM(T1.A15) > 4000 AND MIN(T2.date) >= '1997-01-01'

SELECT AVG(A15) AS avg_crimes_1995
FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
WHERE a.date >= '1997-01-01' AND a.date < '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY d.district_id
HAVING COUNT(d.district_id) > 4000;

SELECT AVG(T3.A15) AS avg_crimes
FROM district AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T2.date >= '1997-01-01'
GROUP BY T1.A3
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.type LIKE '%crime%' THEN 1 END) > 4000;

SELECT AVG(T1.A15) AS avg_crimes_1995
FROM district AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
WHERE T1.A15 > 4000 AND T1.A12 > 1;

SELECT A3, A15
FROM district
WHERE A15 > 4000
ORDER BY A3;

SELECT AVG(T3.amount) AS avg_crimes
FROM district AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T2.date >= '1997-01-01' AND T3.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1995-12-31'
GROUP BY T1.A3
HAVING AVG(T3.amount) > 4000;

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1997 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
      SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON a.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1997 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
      SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T2.date) = 1997 THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T2.date) = 1996 THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T2.date) = 1996 THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    loan AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T1.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T3.date) = 1997 THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T3.date) = 1996 THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T3.date) = 1996 THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    loan AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T1.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1997 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
      SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    account
JOIN 
    loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
JOIN 
    client ON account.district_id = client.district_id
WHERE 
    client.gender = 'M'
    AND client.birth_date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1997-12-31';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1997 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T2.date) = 1997 THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T2.date) = 1996 THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T2.date) = 1996 THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS GrowthRate
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN 
    loan AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id
WHERE 
    T1.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1997 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) - 
     (SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END))) / 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1997 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T1.date) = 1997 THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T1.date) = 1996 THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T1.date) = 1996 THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    loan AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN 
    client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
WHERE 
    T3.gender = 'M' AND 
    (YEAR(T1.date) BETWEEN 1996 AND 1997)

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T4.date) = 1996 THEN T4.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T4.date) = 1997 THEN T4.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
     ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T4.date) = 1996 THEN T4.amount ELSE 0 END))) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN 
    loan AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id
WHERE 
    T1.gender = 'M' 
    AND T4.date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1997-12-31';

JOIN

WITH filtered_districts AS (
    SELECT d.district_id
    FROM district d
    GROUP BY d.district_id
    HAVING AVG(d.A11) > 10000
),
filtered_accounts AS (
    SELECT a.account_id, c.gender
    FROM account a
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE a.date BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31'
),
female_clients AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_female_clients
    FROM filtered_accounts fa
    WHERE fa.gender = 'F'
)
SELECT 
    (CAST(female_clients.num_female_clients AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(filtered_accounts.account_id)) AS percentage_female_clients
FROM 
    filtered_accounts
CROSS JOIN 
    female_clients;

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS percentage_male_clients_requesting_weekly_statements
FROM 
    trans AS T1
JOIN 
    account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN 
    client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
WHERE 
    T1.k_symbol LIKE '%POPLATEK TYDNE%'

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_male_clients
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T3.frequency = 'weekly'

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_male_clients_requesting_weekly_statements
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T3.frequency = 'weekly'

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0) / COUNT(client.client_id) AS percentage_male_clients_requesting_weekly_statements
FROM 
    client
JOIN 
    disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN 
    account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
WHERE 
    disp.type = 'POPLATEK TYDNE';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
WHERE 
    T2.type = 'VYBER' AND T2.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK TYDNE'

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_male_clients_requesting_weekly_statements
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T3.frequency = 'weekly'
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM trans AS T4 
        WHERE T4.account_id = T3.account_id 
          AND T4.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK TYDNE'
    );

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_male_clients_weekly_statements
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T3.frequency = 'weekly';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.client_id) AS percentage_male_clients_requesting_weekly_statements
FROM 
    client AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
INNER JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T3.frequency = 'weekly';

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100) / COUNT(*) AS percentage_male_clients
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T3.type = 'POPLATEK TYDNE';

WITH WeeklyRequests AS (
    SELECT 
        c.gender,
        d.account_id
    FROM 
        client c
    JOIN 
        disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN 
        account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE 
        a.frequency = 'weekly'
),
MaleWeeklyClients AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS male_count
    FROM 
        WeeklyRequests wr
    WHERE 
        wr.gender = 'M'
),
TotalWeeklyClients AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM 
        WeeklyRequests
)
SELECT 
    (CAST(MaleWeeklyClients.male_count AS REAL) * 100) / TotalWeeklyClients.total_count AS percentage_male_clients_weekly_statements;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.client_id) AS percentage_male_clients_requesting_weekly_statements
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T3.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK TYDNE'

SELECT c.client_id, julianday('now') - julianday(c.birth_date) AS age
FROM card AS ca
JOIN disp AS d ON ca.disp_id = d.disp_id
JOIN client AS c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER'

SELECT c.client_id, FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), c.birth_date) / 365) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT c.client_id, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, c.birth_date, CURDATE()) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
LEFT JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER' AND l.status IS NOT NULL;

SELECT c.client_id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT T2.client_id, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', T2.birth_date) AS age FROM card AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE T1.type = 'gold' AND T2.type = 'OWNER'

SELECT 
    c.client_id, 
    c.gender, 
    DATEDIFF(YEAR, c.birth_date, GETDATE()) AS age
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN 
    card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE 
    ca.type = 'gold' AND 
    d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT c.client_id, DATE_PART('year', AGE(c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT c.client_id, DATE_PART('year', AGE(c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN card ca ON a.district_id = ca.district_id
JOIN loan l ON c.client_id = l.client_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
AND d.type = 'OWNER'
AND l.status != 'rejected';

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER' AND l.status = 'active';

SELECT DISTINCT T1.client_id, DATEDIFF(YEAR, T1.birth_date, GETDATE()) AS age
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN card AS T3 ON T2.disp_id = T3.disp_id
JOIN loan AS T4 ON T2.account_id = T4.account_id
WHERE T3.type = 'gold' AND T2.type = 'OWNER'

SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    DATE_PART('year', AGE(NOW(), c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN 
    card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE 
    ca.type = 'gold'
    AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS avg_loan_amount
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'C' AND trans.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS avg_loan_amount
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE trans.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' AND loan.status = 'C';

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS average_loan_amount
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE trans.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' AND loan.status = 'C';

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS avg_loan_amount
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'C'
AND trans.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS avg_loan_amount, trans.date
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'C' AND trans.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
GROUP BY trans.date;

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS average_loan_amount
FROM trans AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN loan AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T1.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' AND T3.status = 'C'
GROUP BY T1.trans_id;

SELECT AVG(T1.amount) AS average_loan_amount
FROM loan AS T1
JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
WHERE T2.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' AND T1.status = 'C';

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS average_loan_amount
FROM loan
INNER JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id
INNER JOIN disp ON account.account_id = disp.account_id
INNER JOIN client ON disp.client_id = client.client_id
INNER JOIN trans ON account.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'C'
AND trans.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS avg_loan_amount
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE trans.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
AND loan.status = 'C';

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS avg_loan_amount
FROM loan
JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN disp ON account.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN trans ON account.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'C'
AND trans.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

WITH LastTransaction AS (
    SELECT
        l.loan_id,
        MIN(t.date) AS last_transaction_date
    FROM
        loan l
    JOIN
        trans t ON l.account_id = t.account_id AND l.date < t.date
    GROUP BY
        l.loan_id
)
SELECT
    AVG(l.amount) AS avg_loan_amount
FROM
    loan l
JOIN
    LastTransaction lt ON l.loan_id = lt.loan_id
WHERE
    l.status = 'C'

SELECT DISTINCT d.type, AVG(d.A11) AS avg_income
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
WHERE d.type != 'OWNER'
GROUP BY d.type
HAVING AVG(d.A11) BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000;

SELECT DISTINCT T2.type 
FROM account AS T1 
JOIN card AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id 
WHERE T2.type != 'OWNER'

UNION

SELECT AVG(T1.A11) 
FROM district AS T1 
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id 
WHERE T1.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000

SELECT DISTINCT account.type
FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE account.type != 'OWNER' AND district.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000;

SELECT DISTINCT card.type
FROM card
JOIN disp ON card.disp_id = disp.disp_id
JOIN client ON disp.client_id = client.client_id
JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE card.type != 'OWNER' AND district.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000;

SELECT DISTINCT account_type FROM disp AS T1 JOIN card AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id JOIN account AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T1.type != 'OWNER'

SELECT AVG(T1.A11) FROM district AS T1 JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000

SELECT DISTINCT T1.type
FROM card AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id
JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE T1.type != 'OWNER'
AND T4.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000;

SELECT DISTINCT card.type
FROM card
JOIN disp ON card.disp_id = disp.disp_id
JOIN client ON disp.client_id = client.client_id
JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE card.type != 'OWNER'
AND district.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000;

SELECT DISTINCT account_type
FROM account
JOIN disp ON account.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN card ON disp.disp_id = card.disp_id
WHERE account_type != 'OWNER'
  AND account.district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000
  );

SELECT DISTINCT type
FROM card
JOIN disp ON card.disp_id = disp.disp_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE account_id NOT IN (
  SELECT account_id
  FROM loan
) AND disp.type = 'OWNER'
AND district.district_id IN (
  SELECT district_id
  FROM district
  WHERE A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000
);

SELECT DISTINCT t2.type
FROM account AS t1
JOIN card AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id
JOIN disp AS t3 ON t1.account_id = t3.account_id
JOIN district AS t4 ON t1.district_id = t4.district_id
WHERE t2.type != 'OWNER'
AND t4.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000;

WITH avg_income AS (
    SELECT d.district_id, AVG(c.A11) AS avg_salary
    FROM district d
    JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
    GROUP BY d.district_id
),
not_eligible_accounts AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.type
    FROM card c
    JOIN disp d ON c.disp_id = d.disp_id
    WHERE d.account_id NOT IN (
        SELECT a.account_id
        FROM account a
        JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
        WHERE d.disp_id IN (
            SELECT card.disp_id
            FROM card
            WHERE card.type = 'OWNER'
        )
    )
)
SELECT * FROM not_eligible_accounts
UNION ALL
SELECT d.district_id, d.A2, d.A3, d.A4, d.A5, d.A6, d.A7, d.A8, d.A9, d.A10, d.A11, d.A12, d.A13, d.A14, d.A15, d.A16
FROM district d
JOIN avg_income ai ON d.district_id = ai.district_id
WHERE ai.avg_salary BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000
120: SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency, T3.A2 FROM account AS T1 JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T3.A2 = 'east Bohemia' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'

SELECT a.account_id, a.frequency
FROM account a
JOIN client c ON a.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%'
AND a.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31';

SELECT T3.account_id, T3.frequency FROM district AS T1 JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN account AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id WHERE T1.A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%' AND T4.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency 
FROM account AS T1 
INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id 
INNER JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id 
INNER JOIN district AS T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id 
WHERE T4.A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' 
GROUP BY T1.account_id, T1.frequency;

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T3.A2 = 'east Bohemia' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'

SELECT T3.account_id, COUNT(T3.trans_id) AS frequency FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T1.district_id IN ( SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A2 = 'east Bohemia' ) AND T3.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' GROUP BY T3.account_id

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency, COUNT(*) AS frequency_of_statement_issuance
FROM account AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
JOIN district AS T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
AND T4.A2 = 'east Bohemia'
GROUP BY T1.account_id, T1.frequency;

SELECT a.account_id, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS frequency_of_statement_issuance
FROM account a
JOIN client c ON a.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE d.A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%'
AND a.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
GROUP BY a.account_id;

SELECT t1.account_id, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM account AS t1 JOIN disp AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id JOIN client AS t3 ON t2.client_id = t3.client_id JOIN district AS t4 ON t3.district_id = t4.district_id JOIN trans AS t5 ON t1.account_id = t5.account_id WHERE t4.A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%' AND t1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' GROUP BY t1.account_id

SELECT c.client_id, a.account_id, COUNT(*) AS frequency_of_statement_issuance
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
JOIN district dt ON c.district_id = dt.district_id
WHERE dt.A2 = 'east Bohemia' AND t.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
GROUP BY c.client_id, a.account_id;

SELECT a.account_id, COUNT(a.account_id) AS frequency_of_statement_issuance
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district dt ON c.district_id = dt.district_id
WHERE a.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
AND dt.A2 = 'east Bohemia'
GROUP BY a.account_id;
189:
SELECT d.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY c.birth_date, d.account_id
ORDER BY AVG(c.A11) ASC, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), c.birth_date) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.account_id
FROM client AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE T1.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY T1.birth_date ASC, T3.A11 ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.account_id
FROM account AS T1
JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE T2.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY T1.district_id
ORDER BY AVG(T3.A11) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T3.account_id FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' ORDER BY T4.A11 ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT T2.account_id 
FROM client AS T1 
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id 
JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id 
WHERE T1.gender = 'F' 
ORDER BY T1.birth_date ASC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T3.account_id FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' ORDER BY T1.birth_date ASC, T4.A11 ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT T3.account_id
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE T1.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY (CURRENT_DATE - T1.birth_date) ASC, T4.A11 ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.account_id
FROM client AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
WHERE T1.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY T1.client_id
HAVING AVG(T1.birth_date) IN (
    SELECT MIN(AVG(T1.birth_date))
    FROM client AS T1
    JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
    WHERE T1.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY T1.client_id
)

SELECT t2.account_id
FROM client AS t1
JOIN disp AS t2 ON t1.client_id = t2.client_id
JOIN district AS t3 ON t1.district_id = t3.district_id
WHERE t1.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, t1.birth_date)) DESC, t3.A11 ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH oldest_female AS (
    SELECT client_id FROM client WHERE gender = 'F' ORDER BY birth_date DESC LIMIT 1
),
average_salary AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, AVG(t.balance) AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN trans t ON c.client_id = t.account_id
    GROUP BY c.client_id
)
SELECT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.client_id = (SELECT client_id FROM oldest_female)
AND a.district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A11 IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY (SELECT avg_salary FROM average_salary WHERE client_id = c.client_id) ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH OldestClients AS (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS min_birth_date
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
),
OldestFemaleClients AS (
    SELECT client_id
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F' AND birth_date = (SELECT min_birth_date FROM OldestClients)
),
SalaryInfo AS (
    SELECT AVG(balance / duration) AS avg_salary, client_id
    FROM client
    JOIN account ON client.client_id = account.client_id
    WHERE client_id IN (SELECT client_id FROM OldestFemaleClients)
    GROUP BY client_id
)
SELECT client_id
FROM SalaryInfo
ORDER BY avg_salary ASC
LIMIT 1;
119:
SELECT 
    a.account_id, 
    d.A2 AS district_name, 
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id AND t.date < a.date
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id, d.A2 AS district_name, d.A3 AS district_region
FROM account a
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id AND d.type LIKE '%POPLATEK PO OBRATU%'
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM a.date) = 1993;

SELECT d.account_id, dt.A2 AS district_name, dt.A3 AS district_region
FROM disp d
JOIN district dt ON d.district_id = dt.district_id
WHERE d.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM trans t
    WHERE t.account_id = d.account_id
    AND YEAR(t.date) = 1993
);

SELECT a.account_id, d.A2, d.A3
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
ORDER BY t.date;

SELECT T1.account_id, T3.A2, T3.A3 FROM account AS T1 JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1993' AND T2.type LIKE '%POPLATEK PO OBRATU%'

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id, d.A2, d.A3
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id AND d.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE t.date LIKE '1993%'

SELECT T1.account_id, T3.A2, T3.A3
FROM account AS T1
JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE T1.date LIKE '1993%' AND T2.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'

SELECT d.account_id, dis.A2 AS district_name, dis.A3 AS district_region
FROM district dis
JOIN disp d ON dis.district_id = dis.district_id
JOIN trans t ON d.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE t.date BETWEEN '1993-01-01' AND '1993-12-31'
AND d.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT T1.account_id, T3.A2, T3.A3 FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN trans AS T4 ON T1.account_id = T4.account_id WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1993' AND T4.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'

SELECT DISTINCT T1.account_id, T4.A2, T4.A3
FROM account AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN card AS T3 ON T2.disp_id = T3.disp_id
JOIN district AS T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1993'
AND T3.issued > (
    SELECT MAX(T5.amount)
    FROM trans AS T5
    WHERE T5.account_id = T1.account_id
);

SELECT d.account_id, dt.A2 AS district_name, dt.A3 AS district_region FROM trans t JOIN disp d ON t.account_id = d.account_id JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id JOIN district dt ON a.district_id = dt.district_id WHERE d.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';
